annotations.comment: If you are annotating to this term, please add an additional annotation to the specific type of fruit (PO:0009001), such as achene fruit (PO:0030107), berry fruit (PO:0030108), capsule fruit (PO:0030091), caryopsis fruit (PO:0030104), drupe fruit (PO:0030103), follicle fruit (PO:0030105), legume fruit (PO:0030100), nut fruit (PO:0030102), samara fruit (PO:0030099), schizocarp fruit (PO:0030098), silique fruit (PO:0030106), or their subclasses, depending on the species.

annotations.label: rhizome
annotations.definition: A swollen shoot axis (PO:0025029) that grows horizontally at or below the substrate surface and produces shoots above and roots or rhizoids below.
annotations.comment: In ferns and many monocots, a rhizome is a primary axis (stem), while in other species, it is a branch. Usually produces scale-like leaves.

annotations.label: shoot axis tuber
annotations.definition: A shoot axis (PO:0025029) that develops from a branch (PO:0025073) and is radially enlarged for storage.
annotations.comment: Functions in storage of photosynthate metabolites. This term should be used for tubers derived from branches, as found in Solanum spp. (e.g. potato) or Dioscorea spp. (e.g. yam) and other species. Use the term tuberous root tuber (PO:0025476) for tubers derived from roots, such as those found in Cassava, Ipomoea, or Hemerocallis.

annotations.label: root-borne shoot system
annotations.definition: A shoot system that is initiated from a root.

synonyms.text: sistema de epiblasto (epiblastema) que nace en la ra&#237z (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: shoot-borne shoot system
annotations.definition: A shoot system that is initiated from a shoot.

synonyms.text: sistema de epiblasto (epiblastema) que nace en el epiblasto (epiblastema) (Spanish, exact)
シュート由来苗条系 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: epicormic shoot system
annotations.definition: A shoot-borne shoot system (PO:0004546) developing from a stem (PO:0009047).

annotations.label: subterranean shoot axis tuber
annotations.definition: A shoot axis tuber (PO:0004543) that develops below ground.
annotations.comment: Functions in storage of photosynthate metabolites. This term should be used for tubers derived from branches, as found in Solanum spp. (e.g. potato) or Dioscorea spp. (e.g. yam) and other species. Use the term tuberous root tuber (PO:0025476) for tubers derived from roots, such as those found in Cassava, Ipomoea, or Hemerocallis.

annotations.label: aerial tuber
annotations.definition: A shoot axis tuber (PO:0004543) that develops above ground.

annotations.label: anther wall middle layer
annotations.definition: A portion of ground tissue (PO:0025059) directly internal to an anther wall endothecium (PO:0020002) that develops from an anther wall secondary parietal cell layer (PO:0006007).
annotations.comment: May be a single or double layer. Usually crushed by the endothecium and therefore almost invariably degenerates early during anther development. In some angiosperms, including Arabidopsis, it develops from an anther wall outer secondary parietal cell layer. In other angiosperms, it develops directly from an anther wall primary parietal cell layer, while in still others, two layers of the middle layer may develop from both an anther wall outer secondary parietal cell layer and an anther wall inner secondary parietal cell layer.

annotations.label: short shoot
annotations.definition: Shoot system in which the internodes elongate little or at all, bearing reproductive structures and/or leaves.

annotations.label: long shoot
annotations.definition: Shoot system in which all or most of the internodes elongate.

annotations.label: carpel primordium
annotations.definition: A phyllome primordium (PO:0025128) that develops from a carpel anlagen (PO:0006005) and is committed to the development of a carpel (PO:0009030).

annotations.label: sepal primordium
annotations.definition: A phyllome primordium (PO:0025128) that develops from a sepal anlagen (PO:0025485) and is committed to the development of a sepal (PO:0009031).

synonyms.text: がく片原基（可視的）  (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: stamen primordium
annotations.definition: A phyllome primordium (PO:0025128) that develops from a stamen anlagen (PO:0025486) and is committed to the development of a stamen (PO:0009029).

annotations.label: fruit dehiscence zone
annotations.definition: A dehiscence zone (PO:0025092) that is part of a fruit.
annotations.comment: Upon fruit maturation by drying, undergoes cell separation, allowing the valves to detach from the replum and seeds to be dispersed. If you are annotating to this term, please add an additional annotation to the specific type of fruit (PO:0009001), such as achene fruit (PO:0030107), berry fruit (PO:0030108), capsule fruit (PO:0030091), caryopsis fruit (PO:0030104), drupe fruit (PO:0030103), follicle fruit (PO:0030105), legume fruit (PO:0030100), nut fruit (PO:0030102), samara fruit (PO:0030099), schizocarp fruit (PO:0030098), silique fruit (PO:0030106), or their subclasses, depending on the species.

synonyms.text: zona de dehiscencia del fruto (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: scutellar node
annotations.definition: A stem node (PO:0020141) that is part of a plant embryo axis (PO:0019018) where the scutellum (PO:0020110) is attached.
annotations.comment: Found in grasses where no hypocotyl is present. The scutellar node may represent a reduction of the hypocotyl and cotyledonary node.

annotations.label: axillary bud
annotations.definition: A bud (PO:0000055) that develops from an axillary bud meristem (PO:0000232).

annotations.label: axillary flower bud
annotations.definition: An axillary bud that develops into a flower.

annotations.label: axillary inflorescence bud
annotations.definition: An axillary reproductive bud that develops into an inflorescence.

annotations.label: axillary vegetative bud
annotations.definition: An axillary bud (PO:0004712) that develops into a shoot system (PO:0009006) that has as organ parts only vegetative organs.

annotations.label: terminal bud
annotations.definition: A bud that develops from a shoot apical meristem.

annotations.label: terminal flower bud
annotations.definition: A terminal bud that develops into a flower.

annotations.label: terminal inflorescence bud
annotations.definition: A terminal reproductive bud develops into an inflorescence.

annotations.label: terminal vegetative bud
annotations.definition: A terminal bud (PO:0004713) that develops into a shoot system (PO:0009006) that has as organ parts only vegetative organs.

annotations.label: long cell
annotations.definition: A more or less rectangular leaf pavement cell in which the proximodistal dimension is several times longer than the transverse dimension.
annotations.comment: In the leaf epidermis of Poaceae and Joinvilleaceae, long cells and short cells often alternate in longitudinal rows. If you are annotating to this term, please add an additional annotation to vascular leaf (PO:0009025) or non-vascular leaf (PO:0025075), depending on the species. All annotations for angiosperms, gymnosperms, and pteridophytes should go to vascular leaf and all annotations for bryophytes should go to non-vascular leaf.

annotations.label: short cell
annotations.definition: An isodiametric leaf pavement cell.
annotations.comment: In the leaf epidermis of Poaceae and Joinvilleaceae, long cells and short cells often alternate in longitudinal rows. If you are annotating to this term, please add an additional annotation to vascular leaf (PO:0009025) or non-vascular leaf (PO:0025075), depending on the species. All annotations for angiosperms, gymnosperms, and pteridophytes should go to vascular leaf and all annotations for bryophytes should go to non-vascular leaf.

annotations.label: hilum groove
annotations.definition: A canal (PO:0025132) that is a longitudinal groove in the testa through a prominent hilum (PO:0020063) of a seed (PO:0009010).

annotations.label: paraclade cortex
annotations.definition: A portion of cortex (PO:0005708) that is part of a higher order inflorescence axis (PO:0009081), also called a paraclade.

annotations.label: pedicel cortex
annotations.definition: A portion of cortex (PO:0005708) that is part of a pedicel (PO:0030112).

annotations.label: sepal vascular system
annotations.definition: A phyllome vascular system (PO:0025206) that includes the totality of the portions of vascular tissue in their specific arrangement in a sepal (PO:0009031).

annotations.label: hypocotyl-root junction
annotations.definition: A cardinal organ part (PO:0025001) that is the part of a plant axis (PO:0025004) where a radicle (PO:0020031) joins a hypocotyl (PO:0020100).

synonyms.text: union del hipoc&#243tile con la ra&#237z (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: vascular leaf primordium abaxial side
annotations.definition: A portion of vascular leaf primordium (PO:0000017) that is distal to the axis of the shoot apical meristem (PO:0020148) and develops into the abaxial side of the leaf lamina (PO:0020039).
annotations.comment: While the abaxial side of the leaf is usually the lower surface, the vascular leaves (PO:0009025) of some plants may not have an obvious adaxial or abaxial side such as the leaves of many xerophytic (arid-adapted) species. The adaxial and abaxial side may appear considerably more rounded and this could be due to early activity of the vascular leaf adaxial meristem (PO:0025401) and/or leaf abaxial meristem (PO:0025401).  In other cases, such as Alstromeria, the leaves may be twisted or resupinate.

synonyms.text: lado abaxial del primordio de hoja (Spanish, exact)
葉原基の裏側、背軸側 (Japanese, exact)  (exact)

annotations.label: vascular leaf primordium adaxial side
annotations.definition: A portion of vascular leaf primordium (PO:0000017) that is proximal to the axis of the shoot apical meristem (PO:0020148) and develops into the adaxial side of the leaf lamina (PO:0020039).
annotations.comment: While the adaxial side of the leaf is usually the upper surface, the vascular leaves (PO:0009025) of some plants may not have an obvious adaxial or abaxial side such as the leaves of many xerophytic (arid-adapted) species. The adaxial and abaxial side may appear considerably more rounded and this could be due to early activity of the vascular leaf adaxial meristem (PO:0025401) and/or leaf abaxial meristem (PO:0025401). In other cases, such as Alstromeria, the leaves may be twisted or resupinate.

synonyms.text: lado adaxial del primordio de la hoja (Spanish, exact)
葉原基(可視的）の表側、向軸側 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: basal axillary shoot system
annotations.definition: An axillary shoot system (PO:0006343) that is part of a stem base (PO:0008039).
annotations.comment: Called a tiller in the Poaceae.

annotations.label: cauline axillary shoot
annotations.definition: An axillary branch that forms from a leaf above the very base of the shoot.
annotations.comment: The genetic distinction between cauline axillary branches and tillers may or may not be unique to the Poaceae. There are no data for other plant families.

annotations.label: shoot axis trichome
annotations.definition: A trichome that is part of a shoot axis epidermis.
annotations.comment: Can occur on a stem or branch.

synonyms.text: eje de tricoma del epiblasto (epiblastema) (Spanish, exact)
シュート軸毛（毛茸、糸状体） (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: shoot axis node
annotations.definition: A cardinal organ part (PO:0025001) of a shoot axis (PO:0025029) where a bud (PO:0000055) may form and develop into a branch (PO:0025073), leaf (PO:0025034), flower (PO:0004541), inflorescence (PO:0009049) or nodal root (PO:0003005).

annotations.label: shoot axis internode
annotations.definition: A cardinal organ part (PO:0025001) of a shoot axis (PO:0025029) that is between two shoot axis nodes (PO:0005004).

annotations.label: articulated laticifer
annotations.definition: A portion of secretory tissue (PO:0005656) that has as parts articulated laticifer cells (PO:0006221).
annotations.comment: The articulated laticifer cells are joined longitudinally to form a tube, with cross-walls that may be partially to fully perforated.

synonyms.text: 連合乳管（有節乳管） (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: anther septum
annotations.definition: A septum (PO:0000030) that is part of an anther dehiscence zone (PO:0005011).

annotations.label: anther dehiscence zone
annotations.definition: A dehiscence zone (PO:0025092) that is part of an anther (PO:0009066).
annotations.comment: Extends along the entire length of the anther and is observed as an indentation between the locules of each theca. Upon anther maturation, cell separation within the dehiscence zone allows the anther wall to break open and pollen to be released.

synonyms.text: zona de dehiscencia de la antera (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: pedicel vascular system
annotations.definition: A shoot axis vascular system (PO:0000039) that includes the totality of the portions of vascular tissue in their specific arrangement in a pedicel (PO:0030112).

annotations.label: hypocotyl epidermis
annotations.definition: A portion of stem epidermis (PO:0025178) which is the  outermost primary cell layer of the hypocotyl (PO:0020100).

annotations.label: embryo cortex
annotations.definition: A portion of cortex (PO:0005708) that is part of a plant embryo (PO:0009009).
annotations.comment: Can occur in the hypocotyl and root.

annotations.label: embryo endodermis
annotations.definition: A portion of endodermis (PO:0000252) that is part of an plant embryo (PO:0009009).

annotations.label: flower vascular system
annotations.definition: A shoot system vascular system (PO:0025205) that includes the totality of the portions of vascular tissue in their specific arrangement in a flower (PO:0009046).
annotations.comment: Because a vascular system is defined as the totality of the portions of vascular tissue in a plant structure, the vascular systems of floral parts are part of the flower vascular system.

synonyms.text: sistema vascular de la flor (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: stamen vascular system
annotations.definition: A phyllome vascular system (PO:0025206) that includes the totality of the portions of vascular tissue in their specific arrangement in a stamen (PO:0009029).

annotations.label: carpel vascular system
annotations.definition: A phyllome vascular system (PO:0025206) that includes the totality of the portions of vascular tissue in their specific arrangement in a carpel (PO:0009030).

annotations.label: vascular bundle
annotations.definition: A portion of vascular tissue (PO:0009015) that is a unit strand of the vascular system (PO:0000034) and has as part xylem (PO:0005352) or phloem (PO:0005417).
annotations.comment: May also contain portions of ground tissue (PO:0025059). The bundle sheath (PO:0006023) can also be part of a vascular bundle, if it is present.

annotations.label: sepal margin
annotations.definition: A phyllome margin (PO:0025018) which is part of a sepal (PO:0009031).

annotations.label: plant ovary wall
annotations.definition: A portion of plant tissue (PO:0009007) that is composed of plant ovary outer epidermis (PO:0005023), plant ovary inner epidermis (PO:0005024), and a plant ovary wall middle layer (PO:0005025)

annotations.label: plant ovary outer epidermis
annotations.definition: A portion of plant ovary epidermis (PO:0006063) which is the outer surface of a plant ovary (PO:0009072).

synonyms.text: 子房の裏側 背軸側の表皮 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: plant ovary inner epidermis
annotations.definition: A portion of plant ovary epidermis (PO:0006063) which is the inner surface of a plant ovary (PO:0009072).

synonyms.text: 子房の表側、向軸側の表皮 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: plant ovary wall middle layer
annotations.definition: A portion of chlorenchyma tissue (PO:0005426) that is part of the plant ovary wall (PO:0005022) and is composed of mesophyll cells (PO:0004006).
annotations.comment: In some species, such as Arabidopsis, there may be a distinct subepidermal adaxial cell layer. The cells in the mesophyll layer(s) may not differentiate similar to the spongy and palisade cells found in the leaf mesophyll.

synonyms.text: capa media de la pared del ovario (Spanish, exact)
middle layer of plant ovary wall (exact)

annotations.label: root giant cell
annotations.definition: Multinucleate cell developed by a series of events involving kayokinesis but not cytokinesis of the initial feeding cell. The events are induced by root knot nematodes (e.g., Meloidogyne sp. ) entering the feeding cells (any cells) of the root vascular system.

synonyms.text: c&#233lula gigante de la ra&#237z (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: root syncytium cell
annotations.definition: Multinucleate cell developed by a series of events involving fusion with the neighboring dividing cells. The events are induced by cyst nematodes (e.g. Heterodera schachtii) entering the feeding cells (any cells) of the root vascular system.

annotations.label: inflorescence vascular system
annotations.definition: A shoot system vascular system  (PO:0025205) that includes the totality of the portions of vascular tissue in their specific arrangement in an inflorescence (PO:0009049).

annotations.label: root primordium
annotations.definition: A primordium (PO:0025127) that develops from a root anlagen (PO:0025433) and is committed to the development of a root (PO:0009005).
annotations.comment: A root primordium may arise from cells of a pericycle (PO:0006203) in a root in most seed plant (pericyclic lateral root primordium; PO:0025492), from cells of an endodermis (PO:0000252) in ferns and some seed plants (non-pericyclic lateral root primordium: PO:0025493), or from cells of a shoot axis (PO:0025029), in the case of a basal root primordium (PO:0025479) or shoot-borne root primordium (PO:0025480). Transition from root primordium to root occurs with the formation of a root cap (PO:0020123), shortly after the development of a root apical meristem (PO:0020147).

annotations.label: lupulin gland
annotations.definition: A glandular trichome (PO:0004509) that synthesizes terpenophenolic resins and prenylflavonoids.
annotations.comment: One of the major chalconoids from hops is xanthohumol (CHEBI:66331).

annotations.label: microsporangiate strobilus
annotations.definition: A strobilus (PO:0025083) that bears only pollen (PO:0025281).

annotations.label: megasporangiate strobilus
annotations.definition: A strobilus (PO:0025083) that bears only plant ovules (PO:0020003).

annotations.label: primary thickening meristem
annotations.definition: A shoot lateral meristem (PO:0006344) that is part of a shoot axis (PO:0025029) and has a parts multiple layers of meristematic cells (PO:0004010) located near the shoot apical meristem (PO:0020148).
annotations.comment: Contributes to primary thickening of a shoot axis (PO:0025029), adventitious (shoot-borne) root (PO:0000042) formation, and formation of linkages between shot axis (PO:0000039), leaf (PO:0000036), and root (PO:0003011) vascular systems. Contiguous with the shoot apical meristem (PO:0020148) in some species, but not all. Produces more or less distinct vascular bundles (PO:0005020) surrounded by ground tissue (PO:0025059), as opposed to the more or less continuous xylem (PO:0005352) and phloem (PO:0005417) produced by a vascular cambium (PO:0005598). A primary thickening meristem is a multi-layered structure, compared to the single layer of a cambium. Found in many monocotyledons.

synonyms.text: 一次 肥厚（膜）分裂組織 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: root pith
annotations.definition: A portion of pith (PO:0006109) that is part of a root stele (PO:0020124).

annotations.label: shoot axis pith
annotations.definition: A portion of pith (PO:0006109) that is part of a shoot axis (PO:0025029).
annotations.comment: Can occur in a stem or branch.

synonyms.text: m&#233dula del eje del epiblasto (epiblastema) (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: secondary phloem
annotations.definition: A portion of phloem (PO:0005417) tissue that develops from a vascular cambium (PO:0005598).
annotations.comment: Secondary phloem develops as part of secondary growth (GO:0080117).

annotations.label: periderm
annotations.definition: A peripheral portion of ground tissue (PO:0025059) in a plant axis (PO:0025004) that is composed of cork cambium (phellogen; PO:0005599), phellem (PO:0004003), and phelloderm (PO:0005050).
annotations.comment: After secondary growth, the periderm may replace the epidermis in stems and roots, rarely in other organs. In some cases, the epidermis is retained after periderm development. Periderm is derived from lateral meristem and may contain secondary phloem.

annotations.label: root periderm
annotations.definition: A portion of periderm tissue (PO:0005046) that is part of a root (PO:0009005).

annotations.label: shoot axis periderm
annotations.definition: A portion of periderm tissue (PO:0005046) that is part of a shoot axis (PO:0025029).
annotations.comment: Can occur on a stem or branch.

synonyms.text: peridermis del eje del epiblasto (epiblastema) (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: phelloderm
annotations.definition: A portion of ground tissue (PO:0025059) often resembling cortical parenchyma produced centripetally by the cork cambium.

annotations.label: hypodermis
annotations.definition: A portion of ground tissue (PO:0025059) that is the outermost layer of a portion of cortex (PO:0005708).
annotations.comment: A layer or layers of cells beneath the epidermis that is distinct in appearance from adjacent tissues.

annotations.label: plant callus
annotations.definition: A portion of plant tissue (PO:0009007) that consists of mass of undifferentiated plant cells (PO:0009002).
annotations.comment: Consists primarily of parenchyma cells but may contain other cell types as the callus begins to differentiate. May be formed as a result of wounding or may develop in culture.

annotations.label: shoot axis hypodermis
annotations.definition: A portion of shoot axis hypodermis (PO:0005057) that is part of a stem cortex (PO:0000223).
annotations.comment: Can occur in a stem or branch.

synonyms.text: hipodermis del eje del epiblasto (epiblastema) (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: shoot axis endodermis
annotations.definition: A portion of endodermis (PO:0000252) that is part of a shoot axis cortex (PO:0000223).
annotations.comment: Can occur in a stem or branch.

synonyms.text: endodermis de eje del epiblasto (epiblastema) (Spanish, exact)
シュート軸内胚葉 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: root endodermis
annotations.definition: A portion of endodermis that is part of a root cortex.

annotations.label: leaf endodermis
annotations.definition: A portion of endodermis that is part of a vascular leaf.
annotations.comment: Often found in the leaf of Gymnosperms and elsewhere.

annotations.label: xylem
annotations.definition: A portion of vascular tissue (PO:0009015) that has as part one or more tracheary elements (PO:0000290).
annotations.comment: Functions in the translocation of water and solutes from roots (PO:0009005) to the shoot system (PO:0009006) and in support. Tracheary elements have lignified cell walls with secondary thickening and are dead at maturity.

annotations.label: aleurone layer
annotations.definition: A portion of plant tissue (PO:0009007) that is the outermost layer of endosperm (PO:0009089) in a seed (PO:0009010), its cells being characterized by presence of protein bodies (GO:0042735).
annotations.comment: Occurs in cereals and many other taxa. The protein bodies (GO:0042735) contain seed storage proteins and enzymes involved with endosperm digestion (Esau, 1977).

synonyms.text: 糊粉粒、アリューロン層 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: endosperm parenchyma
annotations.definition: A portion of seed storage parenchyma that is part of an endosperm.
annotations.comment: Often devoid of intercellular spaces.

synonyms.text: 内胚乳、胚乳柔組織 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: phloem
annotations.definition: A portion of vascular tissue (PO:0009015) that has as parts sieve elements (PO:0025406).
annotations.comment: Functions in the conduction of organic substances in vascular plants.

annotations.label: parenchyma
annotations.definition: A portion of ground tissue (PO:0025059) composed of polyhedral cells typically with thin, non-lignified cellulosic cell walls and nucleate, living protoplasts.
annotations.comment: Parenchyma contains relatively unspecialized cells.

annotations.label: collenchyma
annotations.definition: A portion of ground tissue (PO:0025059) which comprises living tissue composed of more or less elongated cells with thick, non-lignified primary cell walls.

annotations.label: chlorenchyma
annotations.definition: Chloroplast-containing parenchyma tissue.

synonyms.text: 同化組織、葉緑組織 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: sclerenchyma
annotations.definition: A portion of ground tissue (PO:0025059) which comprises supporting tissue composed of plant fiber cells (PO:0025407) or sclereid cells (PO:0025418).

annotations.label: cambium
annotations.definition: A lateral meristem (PO:0020145) that has as part a single layer of cambial initial cells (PO:0000295) and their derivatives, arranged orderly in radial files.
annotations.comment: This term is applied to only two types of meristems: vascular cambium (PO:0005598) and cork cambium/phellogen (PO:0005599).

annotations.label: vascular cambium
annotations.definition: A cambium (PO:0005597) that is located between and gives rise to secondary xylem (PO:0005848) and secondary phloem (PO:0005043).
annotations.comment: A vascular cambium produces cells in both directions, centrifugally and centrifically, leading to an increase in the cross-sectional area of a plant axis (PO:0025004).

annotations.label: cork cambium
annotations.definition: A cambium (PO:0005597) that is part of a periderm (PO:0005046) and produces phellem (PO:0004003) and phelloderm (PO:0005050).
annotations.comment: Cork cambium is located between the phellem and phelloderm and produces phellem toward the outside and phelloderm toward the inside of a plant axis (PO:0025004).

annotations.label: leaf mesophyll
annotations.definition: The chloroplast-containing, photosynthetic parenchymatous tissue situated between the two epidermal layers of the foliage leaf.
annotations.comment: If you are annotating to this term, please add an additional annotation to vascular leaf (PO:0009025) or non-vascular leaf (PO:0025075), depending on the species. All annotations for angiosperms, gymnosperms, and pteridophytes should go to vascular leaf and all annotations for bryophytes should go to non-vascular leaf.

annotations.label: spongy mesophyll
annotations.definition: Leaf mesophyll parenchyma characterized by little elongated cells, that are not closely packed and have conspicuous intercellular spaces.
annotations.comment: If you are annotating to this term, please add an additional annotation to vascular leaf (PO:0009025) or non-vascular leaf (PO:0025075), depending on the species. All annotations for angiosperms, gymnosperms, and pteridophytes should go to vascular leaf and all annotations for bryophytes should go to non-vascular leaf.

annotations.label: palisade mesophyll
annotations.definition: Parenchyma containing closely packed elongated chlorenchymatous cells oriented perpendicular to the leaf surface and which are active in photosynthesis.
annotations.comment: If you are annotating to this term, please add an additional annotation to vascular leaf (PO:0009025) or non-vascular leaf (PO:0025075), depending on the species. All annotations for angiosperms, gymnosperms, and pteridophytes should go to vascular leaf and all annotations for bryophytes should go to non-vascular leaf.

annotations.label: portion of secretory tissue
annotations.definition: A portion of plant tissue (PO:0009007) that form specialized structures producing a secretion.
annotations.comment: The synonym gland does not imply non-secretory 'glands'.

annotations.label: hydathode
annotations.definition: A cardinal organ part that releases water through a hydathode pore.
annotations.comment: Hydathodes may have one or more pores that are similar to stomata but lack the ability to open and close. Hydathodes are involved in the release of water or xylem sap through pores via guttation or secretion. Generally, hydathodes are located at the end of a minor vein in a phyllome. In many plants, hydathodes includes a portion of thin-walled parenchyma between the tracheary elements and the pore, known as an epithem. In some plants, hydathodes are associated with secretory tissue.

annotations.label: salt gland
annotations.definition: A specialized tissue where excess salt absorbed in water from the soil is concentrated, being stores or excreted.
annotations.comment: A crust of salt forms on leaves which tastes bad and the white surfaces act to reflect light. Example, as is Mangrove vegetation.

annotations.label: resin canal
annotations.definition: A canal (PO:0025132) of schizogenous origin, lined with secretory resin cells (PO:0025604) and containing plant resin (PO:0025603).

annotations.label: oil gland
annotations.definition: A gland or a cavity lined with cells that secrete oils.
annotations.comment: Oil glands are schizogenous.

annotations.label: plant epidermis
annotations.definition: A portion of plant tissue (PO:0009007) composed of plant epidermal cells (PO:0004013) that develops from the protoderm (PO:0006210) and covers the surface of a plant structure (PO:0009011).
annotations.comment: The epidermis can be composed of one or more layers of cells. In some species of vascular plants, the epidermis, which is a primary tissue, is replaced by periderm, which is secondary tissue, later in development. The epidermis can also include trichomes, stomatal pores, root hairs, and rhizoids.

annotations.label: aerenchyma
annotations.definition: A portion of parenchyma tissue containing particularly large intercellular spaces of schizogenous or lysigenous origin.
annotations.comment: As applied to an intercellular space, originating by one or a combination of two processes, separation and degradation of cell walls.

annotations.label: cortex
annotations.definition: A maximal portion of ground tissue (PO:0025059) between the vascular system (PO:0000034) and the epidermis (PO:0005679) in a plant.

annotations.label: exodermis
annotations.definition: The sub-epidermal layer or layers of cells of the root similar in structure and cytochemical characteristics of the endodermis, the outermost layer or layers of cells of the cortex.
annotations.comment: The cell walls are thickened and contain suberin. Absent in pteridophytes, fibrous in Phoenix and accompanied by sclerenchyma in Ananas.

annotations.label: secondary xylem
annotations.definition: A portion of xylem (PO:0005352) tissue that develops from a vascular cambium (PO:0005598).
annotations.comment: Secondary xylem develops as part of secondary growth (GO:0080117). Secondary xylem is the wood of gymnosperm and dicot angiosperm trees, shrubs, and lianas. May be organized into axial (PO:0025410) and ray (PO:0025411) systems. Secondary xylem is often part of a shoot axis (PO:0025029) or a root (PO:0009005) but may occur in other organs. Some monocots have a primary thickening meristem (PO:0005039), located near the shoot apical meristem (PO:0020148), that gives the appearance of secondary growth and may produce lignified tissue that appears woody but is not composed of secondary xylem. Tracheary elements in secondary xylem (PO:0000290) have lignified cell walls with secondary thickening and are dead at maturity.

annotations.label: primary xylem
annotations.definition: A portion of xylem (PO:0005352) tissue that develops from the procambium (PO:0025275).
annotations.comment: Primary xylem develops as part of primary growth (request for primary growth has been made to GO) and is not differentiated into axial (PO:0025410) and ray (PO:0025411) systems. Tracheary elements (PO:0000290) have lignified cell walls with secondary thickening and are dead at maturity.

annotations.label: caryopsis hull
annotations.definition: A collective phyllome structure that encloses a fruit of the Poaceae (caryopsis) and develops from a dried lemma and palea.

synonyms.text: イネ科植物 籾殻、外皮 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: phyllome
annotations.definition: A lateral plant organ (PO:0009008) produced by a shoot apical meristem (PO:0020148).

synonyms.text: フィロム、葉(的）器官 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: lower glume
annotations.definition: A glume that is the proximal/basal of the two glumes subtending a pair of florets.

annotations.label: scale leaf
annotations.definition: A phyllome that is reduced in size relative to a vascular leaf on the same plant and is often associated with a perennating or dormant bud or a vegetatively propagating organ such as a rhizome.
annotations.comment: May be photosynthetic or non-photosynthetic. Some species have vascular leaves that are scale-like (such as Juniperus, Thuja, and Chamaecyparis). Annotations for scale-like leaves should go under vascular leaf (PO:0009025), not scale leaf.

annotations.label: upper glume
annotations.definition: A glume that is the apical/distal of the two glumes subtending a pair of florets.

annotations.label: carpel anlagen
annotations.definition: A phyllome anlagen (PO:0025430) that will give rise to a carpel primordium (PO:0004703) and is part of a peripheral zone (PO:000225) of a flower meristem (PO:0000229).

annotations.label: anther wall primary parietal cell layer
annotations.definition: A portion of ground tissue (PO:0025059) that is part of an anther wall (PO:0000002) and has as parts a primary parietal cell (PO:0006010) and adjacent plant cells.

synonyms.text: capa primaria de c&#233lulas parietales (Spanish, exact)
pollen sac primary parietal cell layer (exact)
葯壁一次側膜細胞層、壁細胞層 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: anther wall secondary parietal cell layer
annotations.definition: A portion of ground tissue (PO:0025059) that is part of an anther wall (PO:0000002) and develops from an anther wall primary parietal cell layer (PO:0006006).
annotations.comment: In many angiosperms, the cells of the anther wall primary parietal cell layer undergo a periclinal division, resulting in the formation of two anther wall secondary parietal layers.

synonyms.text: capa secundaria de c&#233lulas parietales (Spanish, exact)
pollen sac secondary parietal cell layer (exact)
葯壁二次側膜細胞層、壁細胞層 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: anther wall inner secondary parietal cell layer
annotations.definition: An anther wall secondary parietal cell layer (PO:0006007) that is formed towards the inside, after the cells of an anther wall primary parietal cell layer (PO:0006006) undergo a periclinal division.
annotations.comment: In many angiosperms, including Arabidopsis, it divides periclinally to form an anther wall middle layer externally and an anther wall tapetum internally. Alternatively, it may differentiate into a tapetum.

synonyms.text: capa interna secundaria de c&#233lulas parietales (Spanish, exact)
pollen sac inner secondary parietal cell layer (exact)
葯壁内二次側膜細胞層 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: anther wall outer secondary parietal cell layer
annotations.definition: An anther wall secondary parietal cell layer (PO:0006007) formed towards the outside, after an anther wall primary parietal cell layer (An anther wall secondary parietal cell layer (PO:0006006) undergoes a periclinal division.
annotations.comment: In many angiosperms, including Arabidopsis, it differentiates into the anther wall endothecium. Alternatively, it may divide periclinally to form an anther wall endothecium externally and an anther wall middle layer internally.

synonyms.text: capa externa secundaria de c&#233lulas parietales (Spanish, exact)
pollen sac outer secondary parietal cell layer (exact)
葯壁外二次側膜細胞層、壁細胞層 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: primary parietal cell
annotations.definition: A native plant cell (PO:0025606) which is formed by the division of a male archesporial cell (PO:0006014), and is part of the anther wall primary parietal cell layer (PO:0006006).

synonyms.text: 一次側膜細胞、壁細胞 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: lateral leaf vein
annotations.definition: An unbranched second order leaf vein (PO:0020140) that runs between two adjacent primary leaf veins (PO:0025413).
annotations.comment: Found in the leaf lamina of some monocots, particularly in Poaceae.

annotations.label: leaf collar
annotations.definition: A thin band of intercalary meristematic tissue at the junction of a leaf blade (lamina) and a leaf sheath found in grasses.

annotations.label: juice sac tissue
annotations.definition: A portion of plant tissue (PO:0009007) which is composed of highly vacuolated cells forming closely-packed, club-shaped sacs with long slender stalks and containing juice.
annotations.comment: Juice sac tissue is found in citrus spp. (hesperidium fruit; PO:0030109), and develops from cells of the endocarp (PO:0009086).

annotations.label: male archesporial cell
annotations.definition: An archesporial cell (PO:0030056) that is part of a microsporangium (PO:0025202) and divides to gives rise to a microsporocyte (PO:0020047).
annotations.comment: Found in heterosporous ferns and seed plants. May also give rise to sterile cells. In seed plants, a male archesporial cell undergoes periclinal division, giving rise to an inner primary sporogenous cell layer and an outer primary parietal cell.

annotations.label: female archesporial cell
annotations.definition: An archesporial cell (PO:0030056) that is part of a megasporangium (PO:0025201) and divides to give rise to a megasporocyte (PO:0000431).
annotations.comment: Found in heterosporous ferns and seed plants. May also give rise to sterile cells. In the majority of flowering plants, including Arabidopsis, the female archesporial cell elongates and polarizes longitudinally, and directly differentiates into the megasporocyte or megaspore mother cell. In some flowering plants, it undergoes a periclinal division, and subsequently the inner cell differentiates into the megasporocyte.

annotations.label: leaf epidermis
annotations.definition: A portion of phyllome epidermis (PO:0025157) that is part of a leaf (PO:0025034).
annotations.comment: If you are annotating to this term, please add an additional annotation to vascular leaf (PO:0009025) or non-vascular leaf (PO:0025075), depending on the species. All annotations for angiosperms, gymnosperms, and pteridophytes should go to vascular leaf and all annotations for bryophytes should go to non-vascular leaf.

annotations.label: helobial endosperm
annotations.definition: A portion of endosperm (PO:0009089) tissue in which the first karyokinetic event is accompanied by the formation of a horizontal wall which divides the embryo sac central cell (PO:0020090) into unequal regions. The larger one is the micropylar chamber in which cytokinesis does not occur and the smaller one is the chalazal chamber.

annotations.label: leaf adaxial epidermis
annotations.definition: A portion of leaf epidermis (PO:0006016) that covers the adaxial/upper surface of a leaf (PO:0025034).
annotations.comment: Used to refer to an adaxial epidermis of an entire leaf. More specific terms exist for leaf lamina adaxial epidermis and petiole adaxial epidermis. If you are annotating to this term, please add an additional annotation to vascular leaf (PO:0009025) or non-vascular leaf (PO:0025075), depending on the species. All annotations for angiosperms, gymnosperms, and pteridophytes should go to vascular leaf and all annotations for bryophytes should go to non-vascular leaf.

synonyms.text: epidermis adaxial de la hoja (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: leaf abaxial epidermis
annotations.definition: A portion of leaf epidermis (PO:0006016) that covers the abaxial/lower surface of a leaf (PO:0025034).
annotations.comment: Used to refer to an abaxial epidermis of an entire leaf. More specific terms exist for leaf lamina abaxial epidermis and petiole abaxial epidermis. If you are annotating to this term, please add an additional annotation to vascular leaf (PO:0009025) or non-vascular leaf (PO:0025075), depending on the species. All annotations for angiosperms, gymnosperms, and pteridophytes should go to vascular leaf and all annotations for bryophytes should go to non-vascular leaf.

synonyms.text: epidermis abaxial de la hoja (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: lateral root apical meristem
annotations.definition: A root apical meristem (PO:0020147) that gives rise to a lateral root (PO:0020121).
annotations.comment: This is different from root lateral meristem.

synonyms.text: meristema apical de la ra&#237z lateral (Spanish, exact)
側根頂端分裂組織 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: shoot-borne root apical meristem
annotations.definition: A root apical meristem (PO:0020147) that gives rise to a shoot-borne root (PO:0000042).

synonyms.text: meristema de la ra&#237z adventicia (Spanish, exact)
不定根頂端分裂組織 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: bundle sheath extension
annotations.definition: A portion of ground tissue (PO:0025059) which forms a strip along the leaf veins and extending from the bundle sheath (PO:0006023) to the epidermis. It may be present on one or both sides of the vein and may consist of parenchyma or sclerenchyma.

synonyms.text: extensi&#243n de la vaina vascular (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: bundle sheath
annotations.definition: A portion of ground tissue (PO:0025059) which comprises a layer or layers of cells surrounding the vascular bundles (PO:0005020) of leaves. It may consist of parenchyma (PO:0005421) or sclerenchyma (PO:0005427).

annotations.label: parenchyma sheath
annotations.definition: A single layered, parenchymatous bundle sheath characterized by presence of large quantity of starch.
annotations.comment: Homologous to the endodermis.

annotations.label: mestome sheath
annotations.definition: The inner endodermal sheath of a two layered bundle sheath. The cells are smaller in diameter compared to those in outer wall (starch sheath). The cell walls are thick and contain suberized lamellae. They are analogous to endodermis.

synonyms.text: メストム鞘、維管束鞘の内側、維管束鞘延長部 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: lemma awn
annotations.definition: An awn that is part of a lemma.

annotations.label: palea apiculus
annotations.definition: A cardinal organ part (PO:0025001) which is a short, abrupt, flexible point at the apex of the palea (PO:0009038).

annotations.label: leaflet margin
annotations.definition: A cardinal organ part (PO:0025001) that is the edge of a leaflet (PO:0020049) and the area immediately internally adjacent to it.
annotations.comment: If you are annotating to this term, please add an additional annotation to vascular leaf (PO:0009025) or non-vascular leaf (PO:0025075), depending on the species. All annotations for angiosperms, gymnosperms, and pteridophytes should go to vascular leaf and all annotations for bryophytes should go to non-vascular leaf.

annotations.label: shoot system epidermis
annotations.definition: A portion of plant epidermis (PO:0005679) that is part of a shoot system (PO:0009006) and arises from the meristem L1 layer (PO:0009020).
annotations.comment: Often interrupted by stomatal complexes (PO:0002000) and other structures. The shoot system epidermis is different from the root epidermis (PO:0006036) in its origin, function and structure.

annotations.label: root epidermis
annotations.definition: A portion of plant epidermis (PO:0005679) that is part of a root (PO:0009005).
annotations.comment: The root epidermis is different from the shoot epidermis in its origin, function and structure.

annotations.label: shoot-borne root epidermis
annotations.definition: A portion of root epidermis (PO:0006036) that is part of a shoot-borne root (PO:0000042).

synonyms.text: epidermis de la ra&#237z adventicia (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: sepal epidermis
annotations.definition: A portion of phyllome epidermis (PO:0025157) that is part of a sepal (PO:0009031).

annotations.label: petal epidermis
annotations.definition: A portion of phyllome epidermis (PO:0025157) that is part of a petal (PO:0009032).

annotations.label: velamen
annotations.definition: A  multiseriate portion of root epidermis (PO:0006036) found in aerial roots of some monocots. Most of its cells are dead and store water like a sponge.

annotations.label: integument epidermis
annotations.definition: A portion of plant epidermis (PO:0005679) that is part of an plant ovule integument (PO:0020021).
annotations.comment: If you are annotating to this structure for Zea mays or other grasses, please also add an annotation to the corresponding floret type. Choose the most specific term possible from: spikelet floret (PO:0009082), ear floret (PO:0006354), upper floret of pedicellate spikelet of ear (PO:0006350), upper floret of sessile spikelet of ear (PO:0006352).

annotations.label: inner integument epidermis
annotations.definition: A portion of integument epidermis (PO:0006043) of the inner integument (PO:0020022) in a plant ovule (PO:0020003).
annotations.comment: If you are annotating to this structure for Zea mays or other grasses, please also add an annotation to the corresponding floret type. Choose the most specific term possible from: spikelet floret (PO:0009082), ear floret (PO:0006354), upper floret of pedicellate spikelet of ear (PO:0006350), upper floret of sessile spikelet of ear (PO:0006352).

annotations.label: outer integument epidermis
annotations.definition: A portion of integument epidermis (PO:0006043) of the outer integument (PO:0020023) in a plant ovule (PO:0020003).
annotations.comment: If you are annotating to this structure for Zea mays or other grasses, please also add an annotation to the corresponding floret type. Choose the most specific term possible from: spikelet floret (PO:0009082), ear floret (PO:0006354), upper floret of pedicellate spikelet of ear (PO:0006350), upper floret of sessile spikelet of ear (PO:0006352).

annotations.label: seed coat epidermis
annotations.definition: A portion of plant epidermis (PO:0005679) that is part of a seed coat (PO:0009088).

synonyms.text: epidermis de la cubierta de la semilla (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: scutellum epidermis
annotations.definition: A portion of shoot system epidermis (PO:0006035) that is part of the scutellum (PO:0020110).

annotations.label: exotesta
annotations.definition: A portion of seed coat epidermis (PO:0006048) which is part of the seed coat (PO:0009088), and develops from the outer surface of the outer integument (PO:0020023).

synonyms.text: 外珠皮の外側の表皮から発生する外種皮 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: endotesta
annotations.definition: A portion of seed coat epidermis (PO:0006048) which is part of a seed coat (PO:0009088) and develops from the inner epidermis of the outer integument (PO:0020023).

synonyms.text: 外珠皮の内側の表皮から発生する外種皮 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: petal abaxial epidermis
annotations.definition: A portion of petal epidermis (PO:0006041) that covers the abaxial/lower surface of a petal (PO:0009032).

synonyms.text: 花弁背軸側 表皮 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: petal adaxial epidermis
annotations.definition: A portion of petal epidermis (PO:0006041) that covers the adaxial/upper surface of a petal (PO:0009032).

synonyms.text: 花弁向軸側 表皮 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: sepal abaxial epidermis
annotations.definition: A portion of sepal epidermis (PO:0006040) that covers the abaxial/lower surface of a sepal (PO:0009031).

synonyms.text: がく片背軸側 表皮 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: sepal adaxial epidermis
annotations.definition: A portion of sepal epidermis (PO:0006040) that covers the adaxial/upper surface of a sepal (PO:0009031).

synonyms.text: がく片向軸側 表皮 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: cotyledon epidermis
annotations.definition: A portion of leaf epidermis (PO:0006016) that is part of a cotyledon (PO:0020030).

annotations.label: cotyledon abaxial epidermis
annotations.definition: A portion of leaf epidermis (PO:0006016) which is the abaxial/lower epidermis of the cotyledon (PO:0020030).

synonyms.text: 子葉 背軸側 表皮 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: cotyledon adaxial epidermis
annotations.definition: A portion of leaf epidermis (PO:0006016) which is the adaxial/upper epidermis of the cotyledon (PO:0020030).

synonyms.text: 子葉 向軸側 表皮 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: filament epidermis
annotations.definition: A portion of stamen epidermis (PO:0025097) that is part of a filament (PO:0009067).

annotations.label: stigma epidermis
annotations.definition: A portion of carpel epidermis (PO:0025096) that is part of a stigma (PO:0009073).
annotations.comment: If you are annotating to this structure for Zea mays or other grasses, please also add an annotation to the corresponding floret type. Choose the most specific term possible from: spikelet floret (PO:0009082), ear floret (PO:0006354), upper floret of pedicellate spikelet of ear (PO:0006350), upper floret of sessile spikelet of ear (PO:0006352).

annotations.label: style epidermis
annotations.definition: A portion of carpel epidermis (PO:0025096) that is part of a style (PO:0009074).
annotations.comment: If you are annotating to this structure for Zea mays or other grasses, please also add an annotation to the corresponding floret type. Choose the most specific term possible from: spikelet floret (PO:0009082), ear floret (PO:0006354), upper floret of pedicellate spikelet of ear (PO:0006350), upper floret of sessile spikelet of ear (PO:0006352).

annotations.label: plant ovary epidermis
annotations.definition: A portion of plant epidermis (PO:0005679) that is part of an plant ovary wall (PO:0005022).
annotations.comment: If you are annotating to this structure for Zea mays or other grasses, please also add an annotation to the corresponding floret type. Choose the most specific term possible from: spikelet floret (PO:0009082), ear floret (PO:0006354), upper floret of pedicellate spikelet of ear (PO:0006350), upper floret of sessile spikelet of ear (PO:0006352).

annotations.label: hypocotyl endodermis
annotations.definition: A portion of endodermis (PO:0000252) that is part of a hypocotyl (PO:0020100).

annotations.label: petiole parenchyma
annotations.definition: A portion of parenchyma tissue that is part of a petiole.

annotations.label: sepal parenchyma
annotations.definition: A portion of parenchyma tissue that is part of a sepal.

annotations.label: petal parenchyma
annotations.definition: A portion of parenchyma (PO:0005421) tissue that is part of a petal (PO:0009032).

annotations.label: mesophyll
annotations.definition: The chloroplast-containing, photosynthetic parenchymatous tissue situated between the two epidermal layers of the leaf or leaf like organs.

annotations.label: petal mesophyll
annotations.definition: The chloroplast-containing, photosynthetic parenchymatous tissue situated between the two epidermal layers of the petal.

annotations.label: sepal mesophyll
annotations.definition: The chloroplast-containing, photosynthetic parenchymatous tissue situated between the two epidermal layers of the sepal.

annotations.label: intercalary meristem
annotations.definition: A shoot system meristem (PO:0006079) that is intercalated between two portions of non-meristematic tissue and results in an increase in length as part of primary growth.
annotations.comment: See subtypes: leaf intercalary meristem (PO:0006346) and stem intercalary meristem (PO:0006347). Not known to occur in roots. Term for primary growth has been requested in GO.

synonyms.text: 節間分裂組織、介在分裂組織 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: primary phloem
annotations.definition: A portion of phloem (PO:0005417) tissue that develops from the procambium (PO:0025275).
annotations.comment: In stem or root it is differentiated behind the apical meristem. Primary phloem develops as part of primary growth (GO term for primary growth has been requested).

annotations.label: metaphloem
annotations.definition: A portion of primary phloem (PO:0006075) tissue that has as parts companion cells (PO:0000071, in angiosperms) or albuminous cells (PO:0025412, in gymnosperms) associated with the sieve elements (PO:0025406) and that develops after the protophloem (PO:0006077).
annotations.comment: Metaphloem develops after a portion of vascular tissue (PO:0009015) has stopped elongating, in the same location as the protophloem, replacing the protophloem. Sieve elements in the metaphloem are larger than in the protophloem. Develops before the secondary phloem, if any is formed.

annotations.label: protophloem
annotations.definition: A portion of primary phloem (PO:0006075) tissue has as parts the first-formed sieve elements (PO:0025406) at a particular location and does not have companion cells (PO:0000071, in angiosperms) or albuminous cells (PO:0025412, in gymnosperms) associated with the sieve elements.
annotations.comment: Protophloem is the first primary phloem to develop in any particular location in a portion of vascular tissue (PO:0009015). Sieve elements in the protophloem are smaller than in the metaphloem (PO:0006076). The protophloem usually only lasts a short time before it is replaced by metaphloem.

annotations.label: shoot system meristem
annotations.definition: A portion of meristem tissue (PO:0009013) that is part of a shoot system (PO:0009006).

synonyms.text: シュート分裂組織 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: primary root apical meristem
annotations.definition: A root apical meristem (PO:0020147) that gives rise to a primary root (PO:0020127).

synonyms.text: meristema apical de la ra&#237z primaria (Spanish, exact)
一次根頂端分裂組織 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: abaxial protoderm
annotations.definition: A portion of protoderm (PO:0006210) tissue that is the outermost layer of the shoot apical meristem (PO:0020148), and gives rise to the leaf abaxial epidermis (PO:0006019).

annotations.label: adaxial protoderm
annotations.definition: A portion of protoderm (PO:0006210) tissue that is the outermost layer of the shoot apical meristem (PO:0020148), and gives rise to the leaf adaxial epidermis (PO:0006018).

annotations.label: portion of transfusion tissue
annotations.definition: Tissue consisting of tracheids and parenchyma cells, associated with the vascular bundle.
annotations.comment: Found generally in gymnosperm leaves.

synonyms.text: porci&#243n del tejido de transfusi&#243n (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: root meristem
annotations.definition: A portion of meristem tissue (PO:0009013) that gives rise to a root (PO:0009005).

annotations.label: primary sporogenous cell
annotations.definition: A native plant cell (PO:0025606) is formed by the division of the male archesporial initial. After several mitotic divisions these cells differentiate into pollen mother cells.

synonyms.text: 一次胞子形成細胞 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: anther primordium
annotations.definition: A floral structure primordium (PO:0025477) that is committed to the development of an anther (PO:0009066).

annotations.label: organogenic callus
annotations.definition: A cultured plant callus that is capable of forming plant organs.
annotations.comment: Plant organs may be formed after the cultured plant callus is treated with plant growth regulators.

annotations.label: embryogenic callus
annotations.definition: A cultured plant callus (PO:0000009) that is capable of forming somatic embryos.
annotations.comment: Somatic embryos may be formed after the cultured plant callus is treated with plant growth regulators.

annotations.label: pith
annotations.definition: A maximal portion of parenchyma (PO:0005421) in the center of a shoot axis (PO:0025029) or root (PO:0009005).

annotations.label: fascicular cambium
annotations.definition: A portion of vascular cambium (PO:0005598) that develops from a procambium (PO:0025275) in a vascular bundle (PO:0005020) that is part of a shoot system (PO:0009006).
annotations.comment: Found in shoot axes (PO:0025029) and vascular leaves (PO:0009025). Portions of fascicular cambium may merge with interfascular cambium (PO:0006201) or the fascicular cambium from adjacent vascular bundles to form a cylinder, or they may remain isolated.

annotations.label: interfascicular cambium
annotations.definition: A portion of vascular cambium (PO:00055980) that develops from cells in an interfascicular region (PO:0006202) that is part of a shoot system (PO:0009006).
annotations.comment: Portions of interfascicular cambium may merge with fascicular cambium (PO:0006200) to form a cylinder of cambium or they may remain isolated. May develop from meristematic cells (PO:0004010) that have never differentiated into another cell type or from parenchyma cells (PO:0000074) that retain some meristematic ability.

annotations.label: interfascicular region
annotations.definition: A portion of ground tissue (PO:0025059) located between vascular bundles in a shoot axis.
annotations.comment: Inapplicable for nearly all monocots.

annotations.label: pericycle
annotations.definition: A portion of ground tissue (PO:0025059) that is part of a root stele located between the phloem and endodermis.

annotations.label: sporocyte
annotations.definition: A native plant cell (PO:0025606) which is diploid (2n), and undergoes meiosis (GO:0007126) to produce four haploid (1n) plant spores (PO:0025017).

annotations.label: spongy mesophyll cell
annotations.definition: Irregularly-shaped, chlorenchymatous cell, separated by large air spaces.
annotations.comment: Usually found in the abaxial/lower part of the leaf mesophyll as in a dorsiventral leaf, but between two palisade parenchyma layers in an isobilateral leaf. If you are annotating to this term, please add an additional annotation to vascular leaf (PO:0009025) or non-vascular leaf (PO:0025075), depending on the species. All annotations for angiosperms, gymnosperms, and pteridophytes should go to vascular leaf and all annotations for bryophytes should go to non-vascular leaf.

annotations.label: palisade mesophyll cell
annotations.definition: Elongated chlorenchymatous cell oriented perpendicular to the leaf surface and which is active in photosynthesis.
annotations.comment: Usually found in the adaxil/upper part of the leaf mesophyll. If you are annotating to this term, please add an additional annotation to vascular leaf (PO:0009025) or non-vascular leaf (PO:0025075), depending on the species. All annotations for angiosperms, gymnosperms, and pteridophytes should go to vascular leaf and all annotations for bryophytes should go to non-vascular leaf.

synonyms.text: c&#233lula del mes&#243filo en empalizada (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: exodermal passage cell
annotations.definition: A short cell in the dimorphic type of exodermis with cell wall that remains non-thickened.

annotations.label: endodermal passage cell
annotations.definition: Cell in the endodermal layer of the root with cell wall that remains non-thickened.

annotations.label: protoderm
annotations.definition: A portion of meristem tissue (PO:0009013) that is the outer layer of an apical meristem (PO:0020144), or the outer layer of a plant embryo proper (PO:0000001), and gives rise to a portion of epidermis (PO:0005679).
annotations.comment: A protoderm may or may not arise from independent initial cells (PO:0004011). Some researchers also refer to it as an epidermis in a  meristematic state.

annotations.label: separation layer
annotations.definition: A portion of plant tissue (PO:0009007) that is part of an abscission zone (PO:0000146) and contains cells that develop an abnormal wall chemistry and swelling resulting in their easily being pulled apart along the pectin-rich middle lamella (GO:0009519).
annotations.comment: Directly involved in the weakening process of abscission.

annotations.label: protective layer
annotations.definition: A portion of plant tissue (PO:0009007) composed of a layer of cells that is part of the abscission zone (PO:0000146) that have lignin and suberin depositions and are found on the axial side of the break or exposed surface of abscission.

annotations.label: root aerenchyma
annotations.definition: Parenchyma tissue containing particularly large intercellular spaces in the tissue of roots.

annotations.label: stem aerenchyma
annotations.definition: A portion of aerenchyma that is part of a stem.

annotations.label: leaf aerenchyma
annotations.definition: A portion of parenchyma tissue containing particularly large intercellular spaces in the leaf mesophyll.
annotations.comment: If you are annotating to this term, please add an additional annotation to vascular leaf (PO:0009025) or non-vascular leaf (PO:0025075), depending on the species. All annotations for angiosperms, gymnosperms, and pteridophytes should go to vascular leaf and all annotations for bryophytes should go to non-vascular leaf.

annotations.label: internal phloem
annotations.definition: A portion of primary phloem tissue positioned internal to the primary xylem.

annotations.label: exotegmen
annotations.definition: A portion of seed coat epidermis (PO:0006048) which is part of the seed coat (PO:0009088) and develops from the outer surface of the inner integument (PO:0020022).

synonyms.text: 内珠皮の外側の表皮から発生する内種皮 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: endotegmen
annotations.definition: A portion of seed coat epidermis (PO:0006048) which is part of the seed coat (PO:0009088) and develops from the inner epidermis of the inner integument (PO:0020022).

synonyms.text: 内珠皮の内側の表皮から発生する内種皮 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: central endosperm
annotations.definition: A portion of plant tissue (PO:0009007) that is the central region of an endosperm (PO:0009089), composed of cells that are significantly larger than those at the periphery, especially the aleurone and sub-aleurone layers.
annotations.comment: Also called starchy endosperm region (characteristic of some grasses).

annotations.label: articulated laticifer cell
annotations.definition: A laticifer cell (PO:0025031) that is joined longitudinally to other articulated laticifer cells to form a tube.
annotations.comment: The walls between contiguous cells may be perforated or may disappear completely. This terms should be used for individual cells. For multiple cells joined together, use articulated laticifer (PO:0005006).

synonyms.text: 連合乳管（有節乳管）細胞 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: non-articulated laticifer cell
annotations.definition: A laticifer cell (PO:0025031) that is not joined longitudinally to other laticifer cells to form a tube.
annotations.comment: May be coenocytic (multi-nucleate) and branched and may grow intrusively between other plant cells (PO:0009002).

synonyms.text: c&#233lula del latic&#237fero no articulado (Spanish, exact)
無節乳管細胞、単乳管細胞 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: root procambium
annotations.definition: A portion of procambium (PO:0025275) tissue that undergoes differentiation to form the primary vascular tissue (PO:0025408) of a root (PO:0009005).
annotations.comment: A derivative of the root apical meristem.

annotations.label: root lateral meristem
annotations.definition: A lateral meristem (PO:0020145) that is part of a root (PO:0009005).
annotations.comment: Not to be confused with lateral root apical meristem (PO:0006020), which is an apical meristem (PO:0020144) of a lateral root (PO:0020121).

synonyms.text: meristema lateral de la ra&#237z (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: tassel spikelet
annotations.definition: A spikelet (PO:0009051) that is part of the tassel inflorescence (PO:0020126) and bears tassel florets (PO:0006310) at maturity.

annotations.label: tassel floret
annotations.definition: A small staminate flower (PO:0025600) that is part of a tassel spikelet (PO:0006309).
annotations.comment: The tassel floret (PO:0006310) initiates both stamens (PO:0009029) and carpels (PO:0009030), but all carpels abort during development. Found in Zea spp.

annotations.label: tassel sessile spikelet
annotations.definition: A tassel spikelet (PO:0006309) which is the ultimate, sessile, higher order inflorescence axis (PO:0009081) of the maize tassel inflorescence (PO:0020126).
annotations.comment: Develops from the tassel spikelet pair meristem (PO:0006358).

synonyms.text: 雄穂（花）の無柄小穂 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: tassel pedicellate spikelet
annotations.definition: A tassel spikelet (PO:0006309) which is the ultimate, pedicellate, higher order inflorescence axis (PO:0009081) of the maize tassel inflorescence (PO:0020126).
annotations.comment: Develops from the tassel spikelet pair meristem (PO:0006358).

synonyms.text: 雄穂（花）の有柄小穂 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: lower floret of pedicellate spikelet of tassel
annotations.definition: A tassel floret that is the lower of the two florets of a pedicellate spikelet of a tassel inflorescence.

synonyms.text: florete inferior de la espiguilla pedicelada (Spanish, exact)
雄穂（花）の有柄小穂の下位小花 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: upper floret of pedicellate spikelet of tassel
annotations.definition: A tassel floret that is one of the two florets placed above the lower floret on a pedicellate spikelet rachilla of a tassel inflorescence.

synonyms.text: florete superior de la espiguilla pedicelada (Spanish, exact)
雄穂（花）の有柄小穂の上位小花 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: lower floret of sessile spikelet of tassel
annotations.definition: A tassel floret that is the lower of the two florets of a sessile spikelet of a tassel inflorescence.

synonyms.text: florete inferior de la espiguilla s&#233sil (Spanish, exact)
雄穂（花）の無柄小穂の下位小花 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: upper floret of sessile spikelet of tassel
annotations.definition: A tassel floret that is one of the two florets placed above the lower floret on a sessile spikelet rachilla of a tassel inflorescence.

synonyms.text: florete superior de la espiguilla s&#233sil (Spanish, exact)
雄穂（花）の無柄小穂の上位小花 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: spikelet pedicel
annotations.definition: Inflorescence branch that terminates in a spikelet.
annotations.comment: This is not a pedicel in the strict sense, but is the ultimate naked part of the inflorescence axis.

annotations.label: ear spikelet
annotations.definition: A spikelet (PO:0009051) that is part of the ear inflorescence (PO:0020136) and bears a single ear floret (PO:0006354) at maturity.
annotations.comment: The ear spikelet forms with two ear florets (PO:0006354), but the lower one aborts during development.

annotations.label: second order inflorescence axis
annotations.definition: A higher order inflorescence axis (PO:0009081) that develops from an inflorescence axillary meristem (PO:0009105) of a first order inflorescence axis (PO:0025104).

synonyms.text: eje de segundo orden de la inflorescencia (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: third order inflorescence axis
annotations.definition: A higher order inflorescence axis (PO:0009081) that develops from an inflorescence axillary meristem (PO:0009105) of a second order inflorescence axis (PO:0006322).

synonyms.text: eje de tercero orden de la inflorescencia  (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: tassel inflorescence branch
annotations.definition: An inflorescence branch (PO:0009081) arising on a first order tassel inflorescence axis (PO:0006324) or from a higher order inflorescence branch (PO:0009081) that is part of a tassel inflorescence (PO:0020126).

annotations.label: first order tassel inflorescence axis
annotations.definition: A first order inflorescence axis (PO:0025104) that is the primary axis of a tassel inflorescence (PO:0020126).

synonyms.text: espiga central del penacho (borla) de la inflorescencia (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: inflorescence axis node
annotations.definition: A shoot axis node (PO:0005004) that is part of an inflorescence axis (PO:0020122).

annotations.label: inflorescence axis internode
annotations.definition: A shoot axis internode (PO:0005005) that is part of an inflorescence axis (PO:0020122).

annotations.label: spikelet meristem
annotations.definition: An inflorescence apical meristem that gives rise to the two or more florets of a grass inflorescence.

annotations.label: spikelet pair meristem
annotations.definition: The meristem that produces two spikelet meristems, each of which produces two floral meristems.
annotations.comment: Found in some grass inflorescences.

synonyms.text: par de meristemas de la espiguilla (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: gynophore
annotations.definition: A shoot axis (PO:0025029) that is an elongation of the floral axis that supports the carpel (PO:0009030).
annotations.comment: A gynophore is only present when there is an elongation of the axis between the androecium and gynoecium. Found in peanut.

synonyms.text: 花被間柱、子房柄、雌蕊柄 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: seed raphe
annotations.definition: A cardinal part of multi-tissue plant structure (PO:0025498) that is a ridge on a seed (PO:0009010) that develops from a raphe (PO:0020027).

annotations.label: seed funicle
annotations.definition: A cardinal part of multi-tissue plant structure (PO:0025498) that is attached to a seed (PO:0009010) and is the remnants of a funicle (PO:0020006).

annotations.label: seed chalaza
annotations.definition: A remnant of the ovular chalaza that is part of the seed.

annotations.label: seed micropyle
annotations.definition: A plant anatomical space that is enclosed by and forms an opening in a seed coat at the apex of a seed and is the remnant of a micropyle.

annotations.label: seed obturator
annotations.definition: An outgrowth of the seed funicle, that forms a bridge between the seed micropyle and other tissues. It is also a remnant form of the obturator found in the ovular funicle.

annotations.label: embryo leaf
annotations.definition: A vascular leaf that is part of a plant embryo and is one of the first few leaves to develop from the embryonic shoot apical meristem.
annotations.comment: This term is used to described not yet fully-developed leaves that are part of an embryo.

annotations.label: juvenile vascular leaf
annotations.definition: A vascular leaf that is distinct from adult leaves, being characterized by particular anatomical traits namely, wax and trichome distribution, presence or absence of epidermal cell types, cell wall shape and biochemistry.
annotations.comment: Many species have juvenile leaves at the base of the stem, adult leaves at the apex, and transition leaves in between. In maize, juvenile leaves are at the tip of the stalk (stem), which differentiates first, with adult leaves at the base, while other grasses may have other arrangements. The first juvenile leaves in Poaceae are the embryonic leaves found in the grass kernel (caryopsis).

annotations.label: adult vascular leaf
annotations.definition: A vascular leaf characterized by particular anatomical traits namely, wax and trichome distribution, presence or absence of epidermal cell types, cell wall shape and biochemistry.
annotations.comment: Many species have juvenile leaves at the base of the stem, adult leaves at the apex, and transition leaves in between. In maize, juvenile leaves are at the tip of the stalk (stem), which differentiates first, with adult leaves at the base, while other grasses may have other arrangements. In some plants the juvenile leaves may go on to establish as adult leaves.

annotations.label: primary shoot system
annotations.definition: A shoot system (PO:0009006) that develops from an embryo shoot apical meristem (PO:0006362).

annotations.label: infructescence
annotations.definition: A reproductive shoot system (PO:0025082) that develops from an inflorescence (PO:0009049) and has as parts each infructescence axis (PO:0025242) and all of the fruits (PO:0009001) borne by those axes.

annotations.label: axillary shoot system

annotations.label: shoot lateral meristem

annotations.label: leaf intercalary meristem
annotations.definition: An intercalary meristem (PO:0006073) that is part of a leaf (PO:0006346) and is intercalated between two portions of non-meristematic tissue between a leaf apex (PO:0020137) and a leaf base (PO:0020040).
annotations.comment: Results in an increase in length of a leaf, as part of primary growth. If you are annotating to this term, please add an additional annotation to vascular leaf (PO:0009025) or non-vascular leaf (PO:0025075), depending on the species. All annotations for angiosperms, gymnosperms, and pteridophytes should go to vascular leaf and all annotations for bryophytes should go to non-vascular leaf. The leaf intercalary meristem does not include a leaf plate meristem (PO:0025429) .

annotations.label: stem intercalary meristem

annotations.comment: Results in an increase in length of a stem internode, as part of primary growth.

annotations.label: silk
annotations.definition: A collective organ part structure (PO:0025269) that has as parts an elongated stigma (PO:0009073) with stigma papilla (GO:0090397), and an elongated style (PO:0009074).
annotations.comment: During pollination (GO:0009856), the pollen (PO:0025281) grows down through a portion of  transmitting tissue (PO:0020102) to a plant ovary ovule (PO:0025490) and a megagametophyte (PO:0025279) to effect fertilization (GO:0009566).  If you are annotating to this structure for Zea spp., please also add an annotation to the corresponding floret type. Choose the most specific term possible from: ear floret (PO:0006354), or one of the child terms: upper floret of pedicellate spikelet of ear (PO:0006350), or upper floret of sessile spikelet of ear (PO:0006352).

annotations.label: fruit abscission zone

annotations.comment: If you are annotating to this term, please add an additional annotation to the specific type of fruit (PO:0009001), such as achene fruit (PO:0030107), berry fruit (PO:0030108), capsule fruit (PO:0030091), caryopsis fruit (PO:0030104), drupe fruit (PO:0030103), follicle fruit (PO:0030105), legume fruit (PO:0030100), nut fruit (PO:0030102), samara fruit (PO:0030099), schizocarp fruit (PO:0030098), silique fruit (PO:0030106), or their subclasses, depending on the species.

All annotations for angiosperms, gymnosperms, and pteridophytes should go to vascular leaf and all annotations for bryophytes should go to non-vascular leaf.

annotations.label: IE.03 3/4 of inflorescence emerged from flag leaf sheath stage
annotations.definition: The stage at which 3/4 of inflorescence has emerged from flag leaf sheath.

annotations.label: IL.03 full inflorescence length reached stage
annotations.definition: An inflorescence detectable phase during which an inflorescence has reached at its full length.
annotations.comment: This phase can only be used if the final length of the inflorescence is known.

annotations.label: IL.02 1/2 inflorescence length reached stage
annotations.definition: An inflorescence detectable phase during which an inflorescence has reached at least one half of its full length, but has not yet reached its full length.
annotations.comment: This phase can only be used if the final length of the inflorescence is known.

synonyms.text: 4.03 1/2 of inflorescence length reached in soybean (related)

annotations.label: IL.00 inflorescence just visible stage
annotations.definition: An inflorescence detectable phase during which an inflorescence is just visible, but has not yet reach one quarter of its full length.
annotations.comment: Includes the time when the inflorescence can be seen by removing outer leaves or bracts, or when the inflorescence is visible as a swelling of the outer leaves or bracts, such as booting in Zea. This phase can only be used if the final length of the inflorescence is known.

annotations.label: whole plant fruit formation stage 50 to 70%
annotations.definition: A whole plant fruit formation stage (PO:0007042) that spans the interval when the average size of fruits (PO:0009001) on a whole plant (PO:0000003) has reached 50% to 70% of its final size.
annotations.comment: This terms is best used for plant with more or less synchronous fruit development and can only be used of the final size of the fruit is known. This stage is to be used for the development stage of a whole plant (PO:0000003). For an individual fruit, use fruit size 50 to 70% stage (PO:0025507).

synonyms.text: 7.07 Pod 70% of final length in soybean (related)

annotations.label: IE.02 1/2 of inflorescence emerged from flag leaf sheath stage
annotations.definition: The stage at which 1/2 of inflorescence has emerged from flag leaf sheath.
