annotations.definition: The long branch that arise from the central spike of tassel in maize.

synonyms.text: ramificaci&#243n lateral larga del penacho (borla) (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: short tassel branch
annotations.definition: The very short branch that may arise from either or both the long lateral branch and the central spike of tassel in maize.

annotations.label: short tassel branch meristem
annotations.definition: The meristem present on either or both the long lateral branch and central spike of a maize tassel that gives rise to short tassel branch.

synonyms.text: meristema de la ramificaci&#243n corta del penacho (borla) (Spanish, exact)
雄穂短枝分裂組織 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: long lateral tassel branch meristem
annotations.definition: The meristem that gives rise to the long lateral branch in the maize tassel.

synonyms.text: meristema de la ramificaci&#243n larga del penacho (borla) (Spanish, exact)
雄穂の長側枝の分裂組織 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: inflorescence axillary meristem
annotations.definition: An inflorescence meristem (PO:0009108) that gives rise to a higher order inflorescence axis (PO:0009081).

synonyms.text: meristema lateral de la inflorescencia (Spanish, exact)
花序側部（側方）分裂組織 (Japanese, related)

annotations.label: tassel meristem
annotations.definition: Meristem that gives rise to the apical and lateral structures of the tassel inflorescence in maize.

annotations.label: tassel inflorescence axillary meristem
annotations.definition: An inflorescence axillary meristem (PO:0009105) that gives rise to the long lateral tassel branch (PO:0009101), short tassel branch (PO:0009102), and tassel spikelets (PO:0006309) in a tassel inflorescence (PO:0020126).

annotations.label: inflorescence apical meristem
annotations.definition: A reproductive shoot apical meristem that gives rise to the apical growth of the inflorescence. It develops from the shoot apical meristem (SAM) after it undergoes transition from vegetative to reproductive phase.

synonyms.text: meristema apical de la inflorescencia (Spanish, exact)
花序頂端分裂組織 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: ear meristem
annotations.definition: The meristem which gives rise to the female inflorescence or ear in maize.

annotations.label: ear inflorescence axillary meristem
annotations.definition: An inflorescence axillary meristem (PO:0009105) that gives rise to a higher order inflorescence axis (PO:0009081) of an ear inflorescence (PO:0020136).

synonyms.text: meristema de la espiga lateral (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: petiole pulvinus
annotations.definition: Pulvinus of the petiole.

annotations.label: plant embryo axis
annotations.definition: A plant axis (PO:0025004) that is the axial part of a plant embryo (PO:0009009).
annotations.comment: Has as parts a hypocotyl, a root meristem and a radicle, if any of these are present.

annotations.label: arilloid
annotations.definition: A cardinal part of multi-tissue plant structure (PO:0025498) that is a fleshy outgrowth of a seed (PO:0009010).
annotations.comment: Often conspicuous and found on seeds with a hard testa that are dispersed by animals. There is some variation in how different sources define the subtypes of arilloids.

synonyms.text: 種皮附属物,　アリロイド (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: strophiole
annotations.definition: An arilloid that is an outgrowth of a seed on a raphe.

synonyms.text: ストロフィオール (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: seed operculum
annotations.definition: A plug-like structure formed in the micropylar region of the seed coat.

annotations.label: tracheid bar
annotations.definition: A portion of xylem (PO:0005352) tissue that is a distinct ring-like structure composed of tracheids (PO:0000301), that is part of a seed (PO:0009010) and surrounds the hilum (PO:0020063) and forms a groove in the surface of the pericarp (PO:0009084) immediately adjacent to the hilum.
annotations.comment: Found some taxa, such as Phaseolus.

annotations.label: plant ovary placenta
annotations.definition: A portion of placenta tissue (PO:0025078) which is part of a plant ovary (PO:0009072), and to which plant ovary ovules (PO:0025490) are attached.
annotations.comment: If you are annotating to this structure for Zea mays or other grasses, please also add an annotation to the corresponding floret type. Choose the most specific term possible from: spikelet floret (PO:0009082), ear floret (PO:0006354), upper floret of pedicellate spikelet of ear (PO:0006350), upper floret of sessile spikelet of ear (PO:0006352).

annotations.label: anther wall endothecium
annotations.definition: An microsporangium endothecium (PO:0025309) that part of an anther wall (PO:0000002).
annotations.comment: May have secondary thickening of walls of cells that are involved in anther dehiscence. There can be more than one layer in an anther endothecium. If you are annotating to this structure for Zea mays or other grasses, please also add an annotation to the corresponding floret type. Choose the most specific term possible from: spikelet floret (PO:0009082), tassel floret (PO:0006310), lower floret of pedicellate spikelet of tassel (PO:0006313), lower floret of sessile spikelet of tassel (PO:0006315), upper floret of pedicellate spikelet of tassel (PO:0006314), upper floret of sessile spikelet of tassel (PO:0006316).

synonyms.text: endotecio de la pared the la antera (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: plant ovule
annotations.definition: A plant organ (PO:0009008) that has as parts a nucellus (PO:0020020) in which a female gametophyte (PO:0025279) is located, one or two integuments (PO:0020021), and a funicle (PO:0020006).
annotations.comment: A seed (PO:0009010) develops from a plant ovule. In angiosperms, a plant ovule is part of a plant ovary (PO:0009072). In conifers, a plant ovule is part of an ovuliferous scale (add term). If you are annotating to this structure for Zea mays or other grasses, please also add an annotation to the corresponding floret type. Choose the most specific term possible from: spikelet floret (PO:0009082), ear floret (PO:0006354), upper floret of pedicellate spikelet of ear (PO:0006350), upper floret of sessile spikelet of ear (PO:0006352).

annotations.label: anther wall exothecium
annotations.definition: An microsporangium exothecium (PO:0025311) that is part of an anther wall (PO:0000002).
annotations.comment: Often with thickened cell walls. Involved in anther dehiscence. If you are annotating to this structure for Zea mays or other grasses, please also add an annotation to the corresponding floret type. Choose the most specific term possible from: spikelet floret (PO:0009082), tassel floret (PO:0006310), lower floret of pedicellate spikelet of tassel (PO:0006313), lower floret of sessile spikelet of tassel (PO:0006315), upper floret of pedicellate spikelet of tassel (PO:0006314), upper floret of sessile spikelet of tassel (PO:0006316).

synonyms.text: exotecio de la pared de la antera (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: placentoid
annotations.definition: A portion of parenchyma tissue that is part of a connective and projects into a pollen sac.
annotations.comment: If you are annotating to this structure for Zea mays or other grasses, please also add an annotation to the corresponding floret type. Choose the most specific term possible from: spikelet floret (PO:0009082), tassel floret (PO:0006310), lower floret of pedicellate spikelet of tassel (PO:0006313), lower floret of sessile spikelet of tassel (PO:0006315), upper floret of pedicellate spikelet of tassel (PO:0006314), upper floret of sessile spikelet of tassel (PO:0006316).

annotations.label: funicle
annotations.definition: A stalk (PO:0025066) that attaches a plant ovule (PO:0020003) to a placenta (PO:0025078).
annotations.comment: If you are annotating to this structure for an angiosperm, please add an additional annotation to plant ovary ovule (PO:0025490). If you are annotating to this structure for an gymnosperm, please add an additional annotation to ovuliferous scale ovule (PO:0025491). If you are annotating to this structure for Zea mays or other grasses, please also add an annotation to the corresponding floret type. Choose the most specific term possible from: spikelet floret (PO:0009082), ear floret (PO:0006354), upper floret of pedicellate spikelet of ear (PO:0006350), upper floret of sessile spikelet of ear (PO:0006352).

annotations.label: megaspore
annotations.definition: The larger, in general, of the two kinds of spores produced after meiosis in the life cycle of a heterosporous plant, and on germination giving rise to the female gametophyte (embryo sac).
annotations.comment: If you are annotating to this structure for Zea mays or other grasses, please also add an annotation to the corresponding floret type. Choose the most specific term possible from: spikelet floret (PO:0009082), ear floret (PO:0006354), upper floret of pedicellate spikelet of ear (PO:0006350), upper floret of sessile spikelet of ear (PO:0006352).

annotations.label: nucellus
annotations.definition: A megasporangium (PO:0025201) in a seed plant, composed of fleshy subepidermal tissue that is part of a plant ovule (PO:0020003) and surrounds a megasporocyte (PO:0000431).
annotations.comment: In seed plants, the megaspores and megagametophyte are retained within the nucellus. If you are annotating to this structure for an angiosperm, please add an additional annotation to plant ovary ovule (PO:0025490). If you are annotating to this structure for an gymnosperm, please add an additional annotation to ovuliferous scale ovule (PO:0025491). If you are annotating to this structure for Zea mays or other grasses, please also add an annotation to the corresponding floret type. Choose the most specific term possible from: spikelet floret (PO:0009082), ear floret (PO:0006354), upper floret of pedicellate spikelet of ear (PO:0006350), upper floret of sessile spikelet of ear (PO:0006352).

annotations.label: plant ovule integument
annotations.definition: A portion of plant tissue (PO:0009007) that covers a plant ovule (PO:0020003), enveloping a nucellus (PO:0020020) and forming a micropyle (PO:0020025) at the apex.
annotations.comment: If you are annotating to this structure for an angiosperm, please add an additional annotation to plant ovary ovule (PO:0025490). If you are annotating to this structure for an gymnosperm, please add an additional annotation to ovuliferous scale ovule (PO:0025491). If you are annotating to this structure for Zea mays or other grasses, please also add an annotation to the corresponding floret type. Choose the most specific term possible from: spikelet floret (PO:0009082), ear floret (PO:0006354), upper floret of pedicellate spikelet of ear (PO:0006350), upper floret of sessile spikelet of ear (PO:0006352).

annotations.label: plant ovule inner integument
annotations.definition: A plant ovule integument (PO:0020021) which is the innermost of the two layers of tissue that usually cover the plant ovule (PO:0020003), contiguous to the nucellus (PO:0020020) and usually contributing to the formation of the plant ovule micropyle (PO:0020025) at the apex.
annotations.comment: If you are annotating to this structure for Zea mays or other grasses, please also add an annotation to the corresponding floret type. Choose the most specific term possible from: spikelet floret (PO:0009082), ear floret (PO:0006354), upper floret of pedicellate spikelet of ear (PO:0006350), upper floret of sessile spikelet of ear (PO:0006352).

annotations.label: plant ovule outer integument
annotations.definition: A plant ovule integument (PO:0020021) which is the outermost the two layers of tissue that usually cover the plant ovule (PO:0020003), contiguous to the nucellus (PO:0020020) and usually contributing to the formation of the plant ovule micropyle (PO:0020025) at the apex.
annotations.comment: If you are annotating to this structure for Zea mays or other grasses, please also add an annotation to the corresponding floret type. Choose the most specific term possible from: spikelet floret (PO:0009082), ear floret (PO:0006354), upper floret of pedicellate spikelet of ear (PO:0006350), upper floret of sessile spikelet of ear (PO:0006352).

annotations.label: endothelium
annotations.definition: A portion of plant tissue (PO:0009007) which is composed of cells of the inner epidermis of the inner (or only) integument of the ovule that are radially elongated and metabolically very active.

annotations.label: plant ovule micropyle
annotations.definition: A plant anatomical space (PO:0025117) that is enclosed by and forms an opening in an integument at the apex of a plant ovule (PO:0020003).
annotations.comment: The micropyle originates as an opening in the integuments of an ovule through which the pollen tube usually enters the embryo sac. In a mature seed the micropyle may remain visible as an occluded pore or may be obliterated. If you are annotating to this structure for Zea mays or other grasses, please also add an annotation to the corresponding floret type. Choose the most specific term possible from: spikelet floret (PO:0009082), ear floret (PO:0006354), upper floret of pedicellate spikelet of ear (PO:0006350), upper floret of sessile spikelet of ear (PO:0006352).

annotations.label: chalaza
annotations.definition: A portion of plant tissue (PO:0009007) that is the region in a plant ovule (PO:0020003) where the integuments (PO:0020021) and the nucellus (PO:0020020) join with the funicule (PO:0020006).
annotations.comment: The chalaza is recognized as the region which initiates the two integuments at its flank. If you are annotating to this structure for an angiosperm, please add an additional annotation to plant ovary ovule (PO:0025490). If you are annotating to this structure for an gymnosperm, please add an additional annotation to ovuliferous scale ovule (PO:0025491). If you are annotating to this structure for Zea mays or other grasses, please also add an annotation to the corresponding floret type. Choose the most specific term possible from: spikelet floret (PO:0009082), ear floret (PO:0006354), upper floret of pedicellate spikelet of ear (PO:0006350), upper floret of sessile spikelet of ear (PO:0006352).

synonyms.text: カラザ（合点）=珠心と珠皮が珠柄につながるところ、珠孔の反対側 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: raphe
annotations.definition: A cardinal organ part (PO:0025001) that is a ridge on a plant ovule (PO:0020003) where a funicle (PO:0020006) is or was fused to the ovule.
annotations.comment: If you are annotating to this structure for an angiosperm, please add an additional annotation to plant ovary ovule (PO:0025490). If you are annotating to this structure for an gymnosperm, please add an additional annotation to ovuliferous scale ovule (PO:0025491).

annotations.label: antiraphe
annotations.definition: A cardinal organ part (PO:0025001) that is the part of a plant ovule (PO:0020003) on the opposite side from a raphe (PO:0020027).
annotations.comment: If you are annotating to this structure for an angiosperm, please add an additional annotation to plant ovary ovule (PO:0025490). If you are annotating to this structure for an gymnosperm, please add an additional annotation to ovuliferous scale ovule (PO:0025491).

synonyms.text: 胚珠の縫線と反対側にある組織 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: obturator
annotations.definition: A portion of plant tissue (PO:0009007) which is an outgrowth of the funicle, that forms a bridge between the micropyle and other tissues.
annotations.comment: Most commonly arising from the funicle, also developing from placenta, integument, etc.

annotations.label: cotyledon
annotations.definition: A vascular leaf (PO:0009025) formed at the first shoot node (PO:0005004) of a plant embryo (PO:0009009) or a seedling (PO:0000003).

annotations.label: radicle
annotations.definition: An embryo root (PO:0000045) that is the basal continuation of a hypocotyl (PO:0020100) in a plant embryo (PO:0009009) or a seedling (PO:0000003).
annotations.comment: May develop into the primary root (PO:0020127) and eventually the root system (PO:0025025) of an adult plant. Sometimes abortive.

annotations.label: plumule
annotations.definition: The shoot apex (PO:0000037) of the plant embryo (PO:0009009), above the cotyledonary node (PO:0025321).
annotations.comment: Occurs in several embryo types.

annotations.label: coleoptile
annotations.definition: A sheath-like plant organ (PO:0009008) that surrounds the plumule (PO:0020032) of a plant embryo (PO:0009009) or the emerging shoot apex (PO:0000037) of a seedling.
annotations.comment: The coleoptile is an outgrowth or part of the scutellum (PO:0020110) (which is a modified, haustorial cotyledon (PO:0020030)).  Develops separate from the shoot apical meristem (PO:0020148).  Found in Poaceae and other monocotyledons such as Zingiberaceae. Protects the emerging shoot system (PO:0009006) as it grows through the soil.

annotations.label: coleorhiza
annotations.definition: A sheath-like plant organ (PO:0009008) that surrounds the radicle (PO:0020031) of a plant embryo (PO:0009009) or the emerging root (PO:0009005) of a seedling (PO:0000003).
annotations.comment: Found in Poaceae and some other monocots as well as some gymnosperms. Protects the emerging radicle in a plant embryo or seedling. The parenchyma cells of both the coleorhiza and epiblast may function in storage.

annotations.label: epicotyl
annotations.definition: The first stem internode (PO:0020142) above the cotyledonary node (PO:0025321) of a plant embryo (PO:0009009) or a seedling (PO:0000003).

annotations.label: epiblast
annotations.definition: A portion of plant tissue (PO:0009007) that is a flap-like projection of the coleorhiza (PO:0020034), inserted opposite the scutellum (PO:0020110).
annotations.comment: The parenchyma cells of both the coleorhiza and epiblast may function in storage. Some researchers consider the epiblast and coleorhiza independent structures that differentiate from the same proembryonic tissue.

annotations.label: mesocotyl
annotations.definition: A stem internode (PO:0020142) that is the part of a plant embryo axis (PO:0019018) or a seedling stem (PO:0009047) above the scutellum (PO:0020110) and below the coleoptile (PO:0020033).
annotations.comment: Occurs in grasses. In grasses, the hypocotyl and cotyledon may not be visible and may be represented by the scutellar node and scutellum, making the mesocotyl similar to the epicotyl in other taxa. Elongation of the mesocotyl during seedling growth pushes the coleoptile above the soil surface.

annotations.label: petiole
annotations.definition: A stalk (PO:0025066) of a vascular leaf (PO:0009025).

annotations.label: leaf lamina
annotations.definition: A phyllome lamina (PO:0025396) that is the part of a leaf (PO:0025034) exclusive of the petiole (PO:0020038) or leaf sheath (PO:0020104), if either is present.
annotations.comment: A leaf lamina is usually dorsiventrally flattened, but may be flattened in a median plant (perpendicular to the axis) in the case of phyllodes (PO:0025335) or other ensiform leaves (PO:0025333). This term should not be used for leaves that are not laminar (flat), like round leaves in Allium or needle-like leaves in Pinus or some Proteaceae. If you are annotating to this term, please add an additional annotation to vascular leaf (PO:0009025) or non-vascular leaf (PO:0025075), depending on the species. All annotations for angiosperms, gymnosperms, and pteridophytes should go to vascular leaf and all annotations for bryophytes should go to non-vascular leaf.

annotations.label: leaf base
annotations.definition: A phyllome base (PO:0025140) that is part of a leaf (PO:0025034).
annotations.comment: If you are annotating to this term, please add an additional annotation to vascular leaf (PO:0009025) or non-vascular leaf (PO:0025075), depending on the species. All annotations for angiosperms, gymnosperms, and pteridophytes should go to vascular leaf and all annotations for bryophytes should go to non-vascular leaf.

synonyms.text: 葉脚、葉底、葉身基部 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: stipule
annotations.definition: A cardinal organ part that is an appendage at the base of a vascular leaf.
annotations.comment: Usually one of a pair of appendages. May take the form of a spine (PO:0025174) or may be bristled or brush-like. Stipules may occur on the opposite side of the shoot axis from the leaf they are associated with, but they are still thought to arise from part of the leaf.

annotations.label: simple leaf
annotations.definition: A leaf in which the lamina is undivided.

annotations.label: compound leaf
annotations.definition: A leaf having two or more distinct leaflets that are evident as such from early in development.

annotations.label: hyperphyll
annotations.definition: The unifacial terete apical portion of a monocot cotyledon, sometimes also visible on other leaves.

synonyms.text: 単子葉の単面円柱形先端 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: pinnate leaf
annotations.definition: A once-compound leaf with leaflets borne along a rachis.
annotations.comment: The total number of leaflets may be even or odd, in which case the leaf is called even-pinnate or odd-pinnate respectively.

annotations.label: palmate leaf
annotations.definition: A once-compound leaf divided into several leaflets which arise at the same point, there being no rachis.

annotations.label: microsporocyte
annotations.definition: A sporocyte (PO:0006204) that produces four haploid (1n) microspores (PO:0020048).
annotations.comment: If you are annotating to this structure for Zea mays or other grasses, please also add an annotation to the corresponding floret type. Choose the most specific term possible from: spikelet floret (PO:0009082), tassel floret (PO:0006310), lower floret of pedicellate spikelet of tassel (PO:0006313), lower floret of sessile spikelet of tassel (PO:0006315), upper floret of pedicellate spikelet of tassel (PO:0006314), upper floret of sessile spikelet of tassel (PO:0006316).

annotations.label: microspore
annotations.definition: The smaller, in general, of the two kinds of spores produced after meiosis in the life cycle of a heterosporous plant, and on germination giving rise to the male gametophyte.
annotations.comment: If you are annotating to this structure for Zea mays or other grasses, please also add an annotation to the corresponding floret type. Choose the most specific term possible from: spikelet floret (PO:0009082), tassel floret (PO:0006310), lower floret of pedicellate spikelet of tassel (PO:0006313), lower floret of sessile spikelet of tassel (PO:0006315), upper floret of pedicellate spikelet of tassel (PO:0006314), upper floret of sessile spikelet of tassel (PO:0006316).

annotations.label: leaflet
annotations.definition: A cardinal organ part (PO:0025001) that is one of the ultimate segments of a compound leaf (PO:0020043).

annotations.label: petiolule
annotations.definition: A stalk (PO:0009025) of a leaflet (PO:0020049).

annotations.label: stipel
annotations.definition: Stipule-like appendage(s) at the base of a leaflet (in unifoliolate or simple leaves, found at the top of the petiole).

annotations.label: bud scale leaf
annotations.definition: A scale leaf that surrounds a dormant or perennating bud.

annotations.label: leaf rachis
annotations.definition: A stalk (PO:0025066) that is the main axis of a pinnate or more highly compound leaf, that bears leaflets or divisions of the axis.

annotations.label: tegmen
annotations.definition: That part of the seed coat that develops from the inner integument.

synonyms.text: 内種子(internal seed coat, inner seed coat, secundine) (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: testa
annotations.definition: That part of the seed coat that develops from the outer integument, or from the single integument when there is only one.

annotations.label: perisperm
annotations.definition: A portion of plant tissue (PO:0009007) which is diploid nutritive tissue in an angiosperm seed derived from nucellar tissue.

annotations.label: caruncle
annotations.definition: An arilloid that is an outgrowth of a seed next to the micropyle.
annotations.comment: Often hard and generally smaller and less elaborate than a arillode.

annotations.label: coma
annotations.definition: A portion of seed coat epidermis (PO:0006048) that consists of multiple seed trichomes (PO:0004511) at the seed micropyle (PO:0006334).

annotations.label: elaiosome
annotations.definition: A cardinal organ part that is an oil-secreting outgrowth of a seed or fruit.
annotations.comment: May be a modified arilloid (a type of strophiole or caruncle) or may be an outgrowth of a fruit. May be attractive to ants and aid in dispersal.

annotations.label: hilum
annotations.definition: A cardinal part of multi-tissue plant structure (PO:0025498) that is a scar on a seed (PO:0009010) at the place where it was attached to a funicle (PO:0020006).

synonyms.text: 核（デンプン粒）、へそ（種子） (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: mericarp
annotations.definition: A cardinal part of multi-tissue plant structure (PO:0025498) which is one carpellate unit of a schizocarp fruit (PO:0030098) consisting of pericarp (PO:0009084) and one or more seeds (PO:0009010).
annotations.comment: A mericarp develops from one carpel of a syncarpous gynoecium. The pericarp of each carpel are fused together until maturity, at which point the carpellate units separate from one another.

annotations.label: embryo sac central cell
annotations.definition: An embryo sac cell (PO:0025026) that is largest cell in a mature embryo sac (PO:0025074).
annotations.comment: In most angiosperms, the embryo sac central cell contains two polar nuclei, and, after double fertilization, develops into an endosperm. In some angiosperms, such as Illicium, the embryo sac central cell contains a single polar nucleus. Embryo sac central cell is distinct from archegonium central cell (PO:0025509).

annotations.label: antipodal cell
annotations.definition: Cell, commonly three in number as in the eight-nucleate embryo sac, located at the other end of the embryo sac from the egg cell.
annotations.comment: More or less persistent, multiplicative or not.

annotations.label: plant egg cell
annotations.definition: A gamete (PO:0025006) produced by an archegonium (PO:0025126) or an embryo sac (PO:0025074).
annotations.comment: The plant egg cell (megagamete) is usually larger than the plant sperm cell (PO:0000084; microgamete).

annotations.label: egg apparatus
annotations.definition: A cardinal organ part that has as parts an egg cell and two synergids and is located at the micropylar end of the embryo sac.
annotations.comment: Found in angiosperms.

annotations.label: generative cell
annotations.definition: A spermatogenous cell (PO:0025525) of the microgametophyte (PO:0025280) that divides to produce two pollen sperm cells (PO:0025121).
annotations.comment: Occurs in angiosperms.

synonyms.text: 雄原細胞、生殖系列細胞 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: microgametophyte vegetative cell
annotations.definition: A native plant cell (PO:0025606) that is the larger cell of a microgametophyte (PO:0025280) in seed plants. It does not divide further and develops into a pollen tube cell (PO:0025195).

annotations.label: hypocotyl
annotations.definition: A stem internode (PO:0020142) below the cotyledonary node (PO:0025321) and transitional to a root (PO:0009005) of a plant embryo (PO:0009009) or a seedling (PO:0000003).

annotations.label: stomium
annotations.definition: A plant anatomical space that is a slit in an anther lobe formed from when a dehiscence zone dehisces.
annotations.comment: Pollen may be released through the stomium. If you are annotating to this structure for Zea mays or other grasses, please also add an annotation to the corresponding floret type. Choose the most specific term possible from: spikelet floret (PO:0009082), tassel floret (PO:0006310), lower floret of pedicellate spikelet of tassel (PO:0006313), lower floret of sessile spikelet of tassel (PO:0006315), upper floret of pedicellate spikelet of tassel (PO:0006314), upper floret of sessile spikelet of tassel (PO:0006316).

annotations.label: portion of transmitting tissue
annotations.definition: A portion of ground tissue (PO:0025059) in the style of a carpel through which a pollen tube grows; it connects a stigma and the inside of an ovary.
annotations.comment: If you are annotating to this structure for Zea mays or other grasses, please also add an annotation to the corresponding floret type. Choose the most specific term possible from: spikelet floret (PO:0009082), ear floret (PO:0006354), upper floret of pedicellate spikelet of ear (PO:0006350), upper floret of sessile spikelet of ear (PO:0006352).

synonyms.text: porci&#243n del tejido de transmisi&#243n (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: flag leaf
annotations.definition: The last mature leaf before the inflorescence in a cereal crop plant.

annotations.label: leaf sheath
annotations.definition: A cardinal organ part (PO:0025001) that is the lower part of a vascular leaf (PO:0009025), and which more or less encases the stem (PO:0009047).
annotations.comment: A leaf sheath is usually tubular shaped, and is found in the Poaceae family and other monocots.

annotations.label: ligule
annotations.definition: A membranous or hairy appendage on the adaxial/upper surface of a leaf, at the junction between sheath and blade, especially in grasses.

annotations.label: leaf sheath auricle
annotations.definition: A cardinal organ part (PO:0025001) that is an ear-shaped outgrowth of the distal part of a leaf sheath (PO:0020104).
annotations.comment: May wrap around the stem (PO:0009047) or branch (PO:0025073) to which the vascular leaf (PO:0009025) it is part of is attached. Found in some Poaceae.

synonyms.text: aur&#237cula de la vaina de la hoja (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: suspensor
annotations.definition: An embryonic plant structure at the base of a plant embryo that develops from an embryonic basal cell and connects an embryo proper to the wall of a megagametophyte.
annotations.comment: The suspensor often allows the embryo to penetrate deep into the endosperm. Across plant species, suspensors are morphologically diverse and may be single- or multicellular, undifferentiated or highly differentiated, and variously shaped.

annotations.label: embryo hypophysis
annotations.definition: A native plant cell (PO:0025606) that is the uppermost cell of a suspensor (PO:0020108) and from which part of the root (PO:0009005) and root cap (PO:0020123) in a plant embryo (PO:0009009) of angiosperms are derived.

annotations.label: scutellum
annotations.definition: An embryonic plant structure that is a more or less shield-shaped and absorptive portion of a plant embryo of Poaceae.
annotations.comment: May be a modified cotyledon.

annotations.label: lateral root
annotations.definition: A root (PO:0009005) that develops from a lateral root primordium (PO:0000016) that is part of another root on the same plant.
annotations.comment: A lateral root primordium may develops on any root, including a primary root (PO:0020127), on an existing lateral root (PO:0020121), or a shoot-borne root (PO:0000042). In seed plants, a lateral root primordium generally develops from pericycle cells (PO:0025261), but cells of an endodermis (PO:0000252) may also participate in its formation in some species. In ferns, lateral root primordia develop from the endodermis.

annotations.label: inflorescence axis
annotations.definition: A shoot axis (PO:0025029) that is part of an inflorescence (PO:0009049).
annotations.comment: An inflorescence axis (PO:0020122) has either a determinate apex, which terminates in a flower meristem (PO:0000229), or has an indeterminate apex, which terminates in an inflorescence apical meristem (PO:0009108).  An inflorescence pedicel (PO:0009052) is the simplest example of a determinate inflorescence axis.

annotations.label: root cap
annotations.definition: A portion of root parenchyma (PO:0025095) tissue that is part of the root tip (PO:0000025) and covers the root apical meristem (PO:0020147).
annotations.comment: Often composed of living and dead parenchyma cells. Protects the root apical meristem.

annotations.label: root stele
annotations.definition: A stele (PO:0025197) that is part of a root (PO:0009005).
annotations.comment: Includes the pericycle as the outermost layer of the stele.

annotations.label: tassel inflorescence
annotations.definition: A staminate inflorescence (PO:0025601) in Zea species that bears the tassel spikelet (PO:0006309) on a terminal inflorescence axis (PO:0020122).
annotations.comment: Branched inflorescence with a central axis and about 10-50 lateral branches.

annotations.label: primary root
annotations.definition: A root (PO:0009005) that develops directly from a seedling radicle (PO:0020127).
annotations.comment: The first root of a plant.  In dicots and gymnosperms  it becomes the tap root, the central axis of a root system (PO:0025025).

annotations.label: leaf margin
annotations.definition: A phyllome margin (PO:0025018) that is part of a leaf (PO:0025034).
annotations.comment: If you are annotating to this term, please add an additional annotation to vascular leaf (PO:0009025) or non-vascular leaf (PO:0025075), depending on the species. All annotations for angiosperms, gymnosperms, and pteridophytes should go to vascular leaf and all annotations for bryophytes should go to non-vascular leaf.

annotations.label: central root cap
annotations.definition: A portion of root parenchyma tissue that is the central part of a root cap in which the cells are arranged in longitudinal files.

synonyms.text: caliptra de la ra&#237z central (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: lateral root cap
annotations.definition: A portion of root parenchyma tissue that is part of a root cap and is parallel to the sides of a root axis.
annotations.comment: This is the general term for the lateral portion of any root cap and not the term for a root cap of lateral root (PO:0003018) or lateral root cap of lateral root (PO:0003020).

synonyms.text: caliptra lateral de la ra&#237z (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: columella root cap cell
annotations.definition: Cell that constitutes the central part of the root cap, arranged in longitudinal files.

synonyms.text: c&#233lula de la columela del caliptra de la ra&#237z (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: columella root cap initial cell
annotations.definition: A root initial cell (PO:0000059) that produces columella cells in the root cap (PO:0020123). In direct contact with quiescent center (PO:0020149).

synonyms.text: c&#233lula inicial de la columela del caliptra de la ra&#237z (Spanish, exact)
柱軸根冠始原細胞 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: root differentiation zone
annotations.definition: A plant axis differentiation zone that is the part of a root and is located behind a root elongation zone.
annotations.comment: Most of the primary tissues of a root mature in the differentiation zone. This zone is where root hairs are produced.

synonyms.text: zona de diferenciaci&#243n de la ra&#237z (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: ear inflorescence
annotations.definition: A pistillate inflorescence (PO:0025598) in Zea species that is highly compacted and bears the ear spikelets (PO:0006320) on a lateral inflorescence axis (PO:0020122).

annotations.label: leaf apex
annotations.definition: A phyllome apex (PO:0025139) that is part of a leaf (PO:0025034).
annotations.comment: It is not precisely defined how far toward the base from the tip a leaf apex extends. For the apical most portion of a leaf, use the term leaf tip. If you are annotating to this term, please add an additional annotation to vascular leaf (PO:0009025) or non-vascular leaf (PO:0025075), depending on the species. All annotations for angiosperms, gymnosperms, and pteridophytes should go to vascular leaf and all annotations for bryophytes should go to non-vascular leaf.

annotations.label: leaf lamina vein
annotations.definition: A phyllome lamina vein (PO:0025348) that is part of a leaf lamina vascular system (PO:0000048).

annotations.label: leaf midvein
annotations.definition: A primary leaf vein (PO:0025413) that is the central vein of a vascular leaf (PO:0009025).
annotations.comment: Often the most prominent vein of a vascular leaf. See costa (PO:0030072) for the central conductive strand of a non-vascular leaf (PO:0025075).

synonyms.text: 葉主脈、中央脈、中脈 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: secondary leaf vein
annotations.definition: A leaf lamina vein (PO:0020138) arising from a primary leaf vein (PO:0025413).
annotations.comment: Vein orders only apply to hierarchically branching vein patterns, not to dichotomously branching vein patterns, as found in some ferns and gymnosperms.

annotations.label: stem node
annotations.definition: A shoot axis node (PO:0005004) that is part of a stem (PO:0009047).

annotations.label: stem internode
annotations.definition: A shoot axis internode (PO:0005005) that is part of a stem (PO:0009047).
annotations.comment: See node.

annotations.label: apical meristem
annotations.definition: A maximal portion of meristem tissue (PO:0009013) located at a shoot apex (PO:0000037) or root tip (PO:0000025).

annotations.label: lateral meristem
annotations.definition: A portion of meristem (PO:0009013) tissue located parallel to the sides of a shoot axis (PO:0025029) or root (PO:0009005) that participates in lateral growth.
annotations.comment: A term for lateral growth has been requested in GO. Lateral meristems contribute to an increase in the cross-sectional area of a shoot axis or root. Examples of lateral meristems are: cambium (PO:0005597) (includes cork cambium (PO:0005599) and vascular cambium (PO:0005598)), shoot lateral meristem (PO:0006344) (includes primary thickening meristem (PO:0005039)), root lateral meristem (PO:0006308), and secondary thickening meristem (PO:0025414). Contrasts with apical meristem (PO:0020144), phyllome marginal meristem (PO:0025404), or intercalary meristem (PO:0006073).

annotations.label: root apical meristem
annotations.definition: A root meristem (PO:0006085) located at the root tip (PO:0000025), behind the root cap (PO:0020123).
annotations.comment: In most cases, it is involved in root elongation.

synonyms.text: meristema apical de la ra&#237z (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: shoot apical meristem
annotations.definition: A shoot system meristem (PO:0006079) formed at the apex of the shoot axis (PO:0025029), including those originating from an axillary bud meristem (PO:0000232).

annotations.label: quiescent center
annotations.definition: A portion of meristem tissue (PO:0009013) that is part of a root apical meristem (PO:0020147) and consists of mitotically and metabolically inactive cells and is located behind the protoderm (PO:0006210) of the root (PO:0009005).
annotations.comment: If a root cap is present, the quiescent center is behind the root cap.

synonyms.text: centro de division de c&#233lulas del meristema (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: inflorescence initiation stage
annotations.definition: Stage of inflorescence development marked by the formation of the inflorescence meristem on a vegetative branch.

annotations.label: cardinal organ part
annotations.definition: A cardinal part of multi-tissue plant structure (PO:0025498) that is a proper part of a plant organ (PO:0009008) and includes portions of plant tissue (PO:0009007) of at least two different types.
annotations.comment: Cardinal refers to the fact that these are biologically meaningful and not arbitrary parts. Examples include petiole (PO:0020038), lamina (PO:0025060), and leaflet (PO:0020049). See also collective organ part structure (PO:0025269), for plant structures composed of parts of multiple organs.

synonyms.text: 基本的な（主要な）器官部 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: basal root
annotations.definition: A shoot-borne internode root (PO:0025593) that arises from a part of the hypocotyl (PO:0020100).

synonyms.text: 下胚軸由来の根、不定根 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: tuber axillary shoot
annotations.definition: An axillary shoot that develops from a tuber axillary bud.

synonyms.text: 塊茎腋 分げつ (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: plant axis
annotations.definition: An axial plant organ (PO:0009008).
annotations.comment: Includes roots and shoots.

annotations.label: plant organ margin
annotations.definition: A cardinal organ part (PO:0025001) that is the edge of a plant organ (PO:0009008) and the area immediately internally adjacent to it.
annotations.comment: Only flattened or laminar plant organs or organ parts will have a margin.

annotations.label: plant gamete
annotations.definition: A native plant cell (PO:0025606) that has half the chromosome complement of the sporophyte and is capable of fertilization to create a plant zygote (PO:0000423).

annotations.label: collective plant organ structure
annotations.definition: A collective plant structure (PO:0025497) that is a proper part of a whole plant (PO:0000003), and is composed of two or more adjacent plant organs (PO:0009008) and the associated portions of plant tissue (PO:0009007).
annotations.comment: Organs can be of the same type or different types. Examples include flower (PO:0009046), perianth (PO:0009058), and inflorescence (PO:0009049). See also collective organ part structure (PO:0025269), for plant structures composed of parts of multiple organs, but no complete plant organs. This was formerly named collective plant structure.

synonyms.text: 集合植物器官構造 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: petal margin
annotations.definition: A phyllome margin (PO:0025018) which is part of a petal (PO:0009032).

annotations.label: leaf lamina margin
annotations.definition: A leaf margin (PO:0020128) that is part of a leaf lamina (PO:0020039).
annotations.comment: If you are annotating to this term, please add an additional annotation to vascular leaf (PO:0009025) or non-vascular leaf (PO:0025075), depending on the species. All annotations for angiosperms, gymnosperms, and pteridophytes should go to vascular leaf and all annotations for bryophytes should go to non-vascular leaf.

synonyms.text: margen de la l&#225mina de la hoja (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: petiole margin
annotations.definition: A cardinal organ part (PO:0025001) that is the edge of a petiole lamina (PO:0025129) and the area immediately internally adjacent to it.
annotations.comment: Petiole margins may be found in flattened (laminar) petioles, but may also occur in laminar extensions of petioles that are rounded or c-shaped in cross section.

annotations.label: bract margin
annotations.definition: A phyllome margin (PO:0025018) that is part of a bract (PO:0009055).

annotations.label: cotyledon margin
annotations.definition: A leaf margin (PO:0020128) that is part of a cotyledon (PO:0020030).

annotations.label: prophyll margin
annotations.definition: A phyllome margin (PO:0025018) that is part of a prophyll (PO:0009042).

annotations.label: scale leaf margin
annotations.definition: A phyllome margin (PO:0025018) that is part of scale leaf (PO:0006003).

synonyms.text: margen de la hoja escamosa (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: tepal margin
annotations.definition: A phyllome margin (PO:0025018) that is part of a tepal (PO:0009033).

annotations.label: sporophyll margin
annotations.definition: A phyllome margin (PO:0025018) that is part of a sporophyll (PO:0009026).

synonyms.text: 芽胞葉、実葉、胞子葉　縁 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: plant spore
annotations.definition: A whole plant (PO:0000003) that arises through meiosis and is contained in a spore wall.
annotations.comment: A spore is usually single-celled in homosporous plants but may be multicellular in heterosporous plants. May have a spore wall (GO:0031160) made of sporopollenin.

annotations.label: phyllome margin
annotations.definition: A plant organ margin (PO:0025005) that is part of a phyllome lamina (PO:0025396).

annotations.label: carpel margin
annotations.definition: The margin of a carpel.
annotations.comment: Only flattened carpels can have a margin.

annotations.label: stamen margin
annotations.definition: The margin of a stamen.
annotations.comment: Only flattened stamens can have a margin.

annotations.label: collective tepal structure
annotations.definition: A perianth (PO:0009058) consisting of one or more tepals (PO:0009033).
annotations.comment: This structure is a perianth (PO:0009058) where there is no differentiation between calyx (PO:0009060) and corolla (PO:0009059).

annotations.label: collective leaf structure
annotations.definition: A collective phyllome structure (PO:0025023) composed of two or more leaves (PO:0025034).
annotations.comment: This term replaces the obsolete term leaf whorl (PO:0008034). If you are looking for annotations for PO:0008034, please use this term instead.

synonyms.text: 葉が集まった構造   (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: collective phyllome structure
annotations.definition: A collective plant organ structure (PO:0025007) that consists of two or more phyllomes (PO:0006001) originating from the same node or from one or more adjacent nodes with compressed shoot internodes (PO:0005005).

synonyms.text: 葉的器官が集まった構造 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: branch node
annotations.definition: A shoot axis node (PO:0005004) that is part of a branch (PO:0025073).

annotations.label: root system
annotations.definition: A collective plant organ structure (PO:0025007) that produces root meristems (PO:0006085), the plant structures (PO:0009011) that arise from them and the parts thereof.
annotations.comment: Generally the below ground portion of a vascular plant.

annotations.label: embryo sac cell
annotations.definition: A native plant cell (PO:0025606) that is part of an embryo sac (PO:0025074).

annotations.label: embryo plant cell
annotations.definition: A native plant cell (PO:0025606) that is part of a plant embryo (PO:0009009).

annotations.label: shoot axis
annotations.definition: A plant axis (PO:0025004) that is part of a shoot system (PO:0009006).
annotations.comment: Often bears leaves and branches. In vascular plants, has at least one node and one internode.

annotations.label: ground tissue cell
annotations.definition: A native plant cell (PO:0025606) that is part of a portion of ground tissue (PO:0025059).
annotations.comment: Includes parenchyma, collenchyma and sclerenchyma cells.

annotations.label: laticifer cell
annotations.definition: A ground tissue cell (PO:0025030) that contains latex.
annotations.comment: May be simple or branched.

annotations.label: hydroid
annotations.definition: A native plant cell (PO:0025606) that is dead at maturity, lacks specialized wall thickenings or lignin, and has tapered ends that are thin and partially hydrolyzed.
annotations.comment: Hydroids are water and mineral conducting cells found in bryophytes in axes and leaves in the gametophytic phase and in the seta in the sporophytic phase.

synonyms.text: ハイドロイド、仮導管状細胞 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: leptoid
annotations.definition: A native plant cell (PO:0025606) that resembles in structure the sieve elements (PO:0025406) of vascular plants.
annotations.comment: A carbohydrate and amino acid conducting cell found in bryophytes in axes and leaves in the gametophyte development stage (PO:0028003) and in the seta in the sporophytic phase. Leptoids have no nucleus at maturity. Carbohydrate and amino acid conducting cells in bryophytes range from conducting parenchyma cells that are indistinguishable from other parenchyma cells to 'leptoids sensu strictu' that are structurally comparable to sieve elements in vascular plants, as well as many intermediate forms. The term leptoid is used for cells that are distinguishable from other parenchyma cells, whether they be intermediate or leptoids sensu strictu.

synonyms.text: レプトイド、師管組織に相当する細胞群 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: leaf
annotations.definition: A phyllome (PO:0006001) that is not associated with a reproductive structure.

annotations.label: storage parenchyma
annotations.definition: A portion of parenchyma (PO:0005421) specialized for carbohydrate storage.
annotations.comment: This tissue could be found in any organ, but often occurs in fruits or tubers. New GO term carbohydrate storage has been requested.

annotations.label: tuber storage parenchyma
annotations.definition: A portion of storage parenchyma (PO:0025035) that is part of a tuber (PO:0025522).
annotations.comment: This is the flesh of a tuber. See part_of children for individual components of tuber flesh. If you are annotating to this term, please add an additional annotation to either shoot axis tuber (PO:0004543) or tuberous root tuber (PO:0025476).

synonyms.text: par&#233nquima de reserva de tub&#233rculo (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: fruit storage parenchyma
annotations.definition: A portion of storage parenchyma that is part of a fruit.
annotations.comment: If you are annotating to this term, please add an additional annotation to the specific type of fruit (PO:0009001), such as achene fruit (PO:0030107), berry fruit (PO:0030108), capsule fruit (PO:0030091), caryopsis fruit (PO:0030104), drupe fruit (PO:0030103), follicle fruit (PO:0030105), legume fruit (PO:0030100), nut fruit (PO:0030102), samara fruit (PO:0030099), schizocarp fruit (PO:0030098), silique fruit (PO:0030106), or their subclasses, depending on the species.

synonyms.text: par&#233nquima de reserva de fruto (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: subterranean tuber storage parenchyma
annotations.definition: A portion of tuber storage parenchyma (PO:0025035) that is part of a subterranean tuber (PO:0004547).
annotations.comment: This term is used to refer to potato tuber flesh. See part_of children for individual components of subterranean tuber flesh.

synonyms.text: par&#233nquima de reserva de tub&#233rculo subterr&#225neo (Spanish, exact)
地下塊茎 貯蔵柔組織 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: aerial tuber storage parenchyma
annotations.definition: A portion of tuber storage parenchyma (PO:0025036) that is part of an aerial tuber (PO:0004548).
annotations.comment: See part_of children for individual components of aerial tuber flesh.

synonyms.text: par&#233nquima de reserva de tub&#233rculo a&#233reo (Spanish, exact)
むかご（珠芽）貯蔵柔組織 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: shoot axis tuber axillary vegetative bud
annotations.definition: An axillary vegetative bud (PO:0004712) that is part of a shoot axis tuber (PO:0004543).

synonyms.text: yema vegetativa axilar de tub&#233rculo (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: aerial tuber axillary vegetative bud
annotations.definition: A tuber axillary vegetative bud that is part of an aerial tuber.

synonyms.text: yema vegetativa axilar de tub&#233rculo a&#233reo (Spanish, exact)
むかご（珠芽）腋枝芽 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: subterranean tuber axillary vegetative bud
annotations.definition: A tuber axillary vegetative bud that is part of a subterranean tuber.
annotations.comment: A structure on the tuber surface that can sprout. In potatoes, axillary vegetative buds (eyes) can determine processing quality. Scale that the breeders use to rate the buds/sprouts of tubers: 1. none, 2. swollen eye, 3. sprout ca. 1/4 inch, 4. sprout ca. 1/2 inch, 5. sprout ca. 1 inch, 6. sprout ca. 2 inch, 7. sprout ca. 3 inch, 8. new top growth, 9. chain tubers.

synonyms.text: yema vegetativa axilar de tub&#233rculo subterr&#225neo (Spanish, exact)
地下塊茎腋栄養芽 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: shoot axis tuber periderm
annotations.definition: A portion of shoot axis periderm (PO:0005048) that is part of a shoot axis tuber (PO:0004543).

annotations.label: aerial tuber periderm
annotations.definition: A portion of tuber periderm that is part of an aerial tuber.

annotations.label: subterranean tuber periderm
annotations.definition: A portion of tuber periderm that is part of a subterranean tuber.
annotations.comment: The skin of young potatoes is epidermis while the skin of mature potatoes is periderm.

synonyms.text: 地下塊茎 周皮 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: shoot axis tuber epidermis
annotations.definition: A portion of shoot axis epidermis (PO:0000112) that is part of a shoot axis tuber (PO:0004543).

annotations.label: aerial tuber epidermis
annotations.definition: A portion of shoot axis tuber epidermis (PO:0025046) that is part of an aerial tuber (PO:0004548).

annotations.label: subterranean tuber epidermis
annotations.definition: A shoot axis tuber epidermis (PO:0025046) that is part of a subterranean shoot axis tuber (PO:0004547).
annotations.comment: The skin of young potatoes is epidermis while the skin of mature potatoes is periderm.

synonyms.text: 地下塊茎 表皮 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: subterranean tuber interfascicular region
annotations.definition: A tuber interfascicular region that is part of a subterranean tuber storage parenchyma.
annotations.comment: Because subterranean interfascicular regions in potato tubers form before the subterranean tuber perimedullary zone expands (PO:0025063), in mature potato tubers, the subterranean tuber interfascicular regions persist as rays that extend from the central pith to the eyes or subterranean tuber axillary vegetative buds (PO:0025042).

synonyms.text: regi&#243n interfascicular de tub&#233rculo subterr&#225neo (Spanish, exact)
地下塊茎維管束間領域 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: tuber interfascicular region
annotations.definition: An interfascicular region that is part of a tuber storage parenchyma.

synonyms.text: 塊茎維管束間領域 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: aerial tuber interfascicular region
annotations.definition: A tuber interfascicular region that is part of an aerial tuber storage parenchyma.

synonyms.text: regi&#243n interfascicular de tub&#233rculo a&#233reo (Spanish, exact)
むかご（珠芽）維管束間領域 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: tuber pith
annotations.definition: A portion of pith (PO:0006109) that is part of a tuber storage parenchyma (PO:0025036).

annotations.label: subterranean tuber pith
annotations.definition: A portion of tuber pith (PO:0025052) that is part of a subterranean tuber storage parenchyma (PO:0025038).
annotations.comment: In potatoes, this is part of the flesh.

annotations.label: aerial tuber pith
annotations.definition: A portion of tuber pith (PO:0025052) that is part of an aerial tuber storage parenchyma (PO:0025039).

annotations.label: tuber cortex
annotations.definition: A portion of cortex (PO:0005708) that is part of a tuber storage parenchyma (PO:0025036).

annotations.label: aerial tuber cortex
annotations.definition: A portion of tuber cortex that is part of an aerial tuber storage parenchyma.

annotations.label: subterranean tuber cortex
annotations.definition: A portion of tuber cortex that is part of a subterranean tuber storage parenchyma.

synonyms.text: 地下塊茎 皮層 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: perimedullary zone
annotations.definition: A portion of parenchyma (PO:0005421) that is the outer layer of the pith (PO:0006109).
annotations.comment: The term perimedullary zone is only used when the outer layer of the pith is distinct from the inner layer.

annotations.label: portion of ground tissue
annotations.definition: Any portion of plant tissue (PO:0009007) other than epidermis (PO:0005679) or vascular tissue (PO:0009015).
annotations.comment: Develops from the ground meristem (PO:0025594).

annotations.label: lamina
annotations.definition: A cardinal part of multi-tissue plant structure (PO:0025498) that is thin and flat.
annotations.comment: PATO:0000407 (flat) and PATO:0000592 (thin).

annotations.label: tuber perimedullary zone
annotations.definition: A perimedullary zone (PO:0025058) that is part of a tuber pith (PO:0025052).

annotations.label: aerial tuber perimedullary zone
annotations.definition: A tuber perimedullary zone that is part of an aerial tuber pith.

synonyms.text: zona perimedular del tub&#233rculo a&#233reo (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: subterranean tuber perimedullary zone
annotations.definition: A tuber perimedullary zone that is part of a subterranean tuber pith.

synonyms.text: zona perimedular del tub&#233rculo subterr&#225neo (Spanish, exact)
地下塊茎 髄冠 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: shoot axis perimedullary zone
annotations.definition: A perimedullary zone (PO:0025058) that is part of a shoot axis pith (PO:0005041).
annotations.comment: Can occur in a stem or branch.

synonyms.text: zona perimedular de eje del epiblasto (epiblastema) (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: root perimedullary zone
annotations.definition: A perimedullary zone that is part of a root pith.

synonyms.text: zona perimedular de la ra&#237z (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: stalk
annotations.definition: A cardinal organ part (PO:0025001) that is elongated and sub-cylindrical to cylindrical and supports another cardinal organ part.
annotations.comment: Some stalks may be ridged or grooved.

synonyms.text: tallo de alto orden (secundario, terciario, etc) (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: seed storage parenchyma
annotations.definition: A portion of storage parenchyma that is part of a seed.

synonyms.text: par&#233nquima de reserva de la semilla (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: shoot axis tuber axillary bud meristem
annotations.definition: An axillary bud meristem (PO:0000232) that is part of a shoot axis tuber (PO:0004543).
annotations.comment: As the bud grows, the meristem switches from being an axillary meristem to being a shoot apical meristem.

synonyms.text: meristema axilar de yema de tub&#233rculo (Spanish, exact)
塊茎腋芽 分裂組織 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: aerial tuber axillary bud meristem
annotations.definition: A tuber axillary bud meristem that is part of an aerial tuber.

synonyms.text: meristema axilar de yema de tub&#233rculo a&#233reo (Spanish, exact)
むかご（珠芽）腋芽分裂組織 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: subterranean tuber axillary bud meristem
annotations.definition: A tuber axillary bud meristem that is part of a subterranean tuber.

synonyms.text: meristema axilar de yema de tub&#233rculo subterr&#225neo (Spanish, exact)
地下塊茎腋芽 分裂組織 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: terminal reproductive bud
annotations.definition: A terminal bud that develops into a reproductive structure.

annotations.label: axillary reproductive bud
annotations.definition: An axillary bud (PO:0004709) that develops into an reproductive shoot system (PO:0025082).

annotations.label: branch
annotations.definition: A shoot axis (PO:00025029) that develops from an axillary bud meristem (PO:0000232) or from equal divisions of a meristematic apical cell (PO:0030007).
annotations.comment: In vascular plants, branches arise from an axillary bud meristem (PO:0000232) and from divisions of the meristematic apical cell (PO:0030007) in non-vascular plants.

annotations.label: embryo sac
annotations.definition: A megagametophyte (PO:0025279) that is located in a plant ovary ovule (PO:0025490).
annotations.comment: Produces an embryo sac egg cell (PO:0025123).

annotations.label: non-vascular leaf
annotations.definition: A leaf (PO:0025034) in a non-vascular plant.
annotations.comment: Non-vascular leaves occur in the gametophyte development stage (PO:0028003) of Bryophytes, plants such as moss and liverwort.

annotations.label: axillary strobilus bud
annotations.definition: An axillary reproductive bud that develops into a strobilus.

synonyms.text: 腋珠果（ストロビル）芽 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: terminal strobilus bud
annotations.definition: A terminal reproductive bud that develops into a strobilus.

annotations.label: placenta
annotations.definition: A portion of plant tissue (PO:0009007) at the interface between two plant structures, one of which is in a gametophyte development stage (PO:0028003) and one of which is in a sporophyte development stage (PO:0028002), and that has as parts transfer cells (PO:0000078).
annotations.comment: The transfer cells aid in nutrient transport. Examples include ovary placenta (PO:0020001) and fruit placenta (PO:0004535).

annotations.label: aerial tuber axillary shoot
annotations.definition: An axillary shoot that develops from an aerial tuber axillary bud.

synonyms.text: epiblasto (epiblastema) axilar de tub&#233rculo a&#233reo (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: branch internode
annotations.definition: A shoot axis internode (PO:0005005) that is part of a branch (PO:0025073).

annotations.label: subterranean tuber axillary shoot
annotations.definition: An axillary shoot that develops from a subterranean tuber axillary bud.
annotations.comment: See also subterranean tuber axillary bud (PO:0025042).

synonyms.text: epiblasto (epiblastema) axilar de tub&#233rculo subterr&#225neo (Spanish, exact)
地下塊茎腋 分げつ (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: reproductive shoot system
annotations.definition: A shoot system (PO:0009006) in the sporophytic phase that has as part at least one sporangium (PO:0025094).

synonyms.text: 生殖シュート 系、苗条系 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: strobilus
annotations.definition: A reproductive shoot system (PO:0025082) consisting of a number of sporophylls (PO:0009026) or plant ovule (PO:0020003)-bearing modified leaves (PO:0025034) grouped terminally on a stem (PO:0009047).
annotations.comment: May be simple or compound. Found in lycophytes such as Selaginella and Lycopodium, sphenophytes such as Equisetum, gymnosperms such as cycad, conifers, gnetophytes and the pollen producing structures of Gingko. The term cone is often used for strobili that are woody. Flowers are sometimes considered bisexual strobili. Some flowering plants such as Alnus have inflorescences called catkins that resemble strobili, but are not.

synonyms.text: 胞子嚢穂,　球花 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: reproductive bud
annotations.definition: A bud that develops into a reproductive shoot system.

annotations.label: strobilus bud
annotations.definition: A bud that develops into a strobilus.

annotations.label: gynoecium ridge
annotations.definition: A gynoecium in the early stages of development, characterized as a ridge on the abaxial surface of the floral meristem that develops from a gynoecium primordium.
annotations.comment: Common in monocots, including species of Poaceae such as Zea mays. If you are annotating to this structure for Zea mays or other grasses, please also add an annotation to the corresponding floret type. Choose the most specific term possible from: spikelet floret (PO:0009082), ear floret (PO:0006354), lower floret of pedicellate spikelet of ear (PO:0006353), lower floret of sessile spikelet of ear (PO:0006351), upper floret of pedicellate spikelet of ear (PO:0006350), upper floret of sessile spikelet of ear (PO:0006352). In Zea mays, development of the gynoecium ridge of the upper floret of pedicellate spikelet of ear occurs via continued overgrowth of the shoot apex (which becomes the ovule primordium) by a ring of gynoecial tissue, leading to the formation of a stylar canal that is detected as a slight protuberance on the mature ovary. Early development of the gynoecium ridge of the lower floret of pedicellate spikelet of ear is very similar to that of the upper floret of the pedicellate spikelet of ear, except the development does not proceed beyond the early ridge stage.

synonyms.text: gynoecium ridge of lower floret of pedicellate spikelet of ear (narrow)
gynoecium ridge of lower floret of sessile spikelet of ear (narrow)
gynoecium ridge of upper floret of pedicellate spikelet of ear (narrow)
gynoecium ridge of upper floret of sessile spikelet of ear (narrow)

annotations.label: dehiscence zone
annotations.definition: A portion of plant tissue (PO:0009007) that is part of a plant structure and consists of a narrow band of cells that undergoes dehiscence upon maturation of the structure.

annotations.label: spore capsule annulus
annotations.definition: A dehiscence zone (PO:0025092) that is part of a spore capsule.
annotations.comment: Found in bryophytes. The capsule annulus is located at the base of an operculum. Upon capsule maturation, cell separation in the annulus allows the operculum to separate from the capsule, aiding in spore dispersal.

synonyms.text: anillo de la c&#225psula de musgos (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: sporangium
annotations.definition: A plant organ (PO:0009008) in which plant spores (PO:0025017) are produced.
annotations.comment: In bryophytes, particularly in mosses, a sporangium is referred to as a capsule. In seed plants, a sporangium is located in a sporophyll. In pteridophytes, a sporangium is located on the surface of a sporophyll or fertile leaf or borne on a sporangiophore. May be unicellular in some algae.

annotations.label: root parenchyma
annotations.definition: A portion of parenchyma tissue (PO:0005421) that is part of a root (PO:0009005).

annotations.label: carpel epidermis
annotations.definition: A portion of phyllome epidermis (PO:0025157) that is part of a carpel (PO:0009030).

synonyms.text: A portion of carpel epidermis (PO:0025096) that covers the abaxial surface of a carpel (PO:0009030). (broad)

annotations.label: stamen epidermis
annotations.definition: A portion of phyllome epidermis (PO:0025157) that is part of a stamen (PO:0009029).

annotations.label: bract trichome
annotations.definition: A phyllome trichome that is part of a bract epidermis.

annotations.label: embryo plant structure
annotations.definition: A plant structure (PO:0009011) that is part of an plant embryo (PO:0009009).
annotations.comment: Includes plant structures that only occur in embryos (such as suspensor) as well as plant structures that are part of an embryo when a plant is in the embryonic phase (such as embryonic radicle).

annotations.label: shoot axis internode elongation zone
annotations.definition: A plant axis elongation zone (PO:0025180) that is part of a shoot axis internode (PO:0005005).

synonyms.text: zona de elongaci&#243n del internodo de epiblasto (epiblastema) (Spanish, exact)
シュート節間伸長帯（層） (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: branch internode elongation zone
annotations.definition: A shoot axis internode elongation zone (PO:0025100) that is part of a branch internode (PO:0025080).

synonyms.text: zona de elongaci&#243n de la ramificaci&#243n del internodo (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: shoot internode differentiation zone
annotations.definition: A plant axis differentiation zone that is part of a shoot axis.

synonyms.text: zona de diferenciaci&#243n del internodo del epiblasto (epiblastema) (Spanish, exact)
シュート節間分化帯(層)  (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: branch internode differentiation zone
annotations.definition: A shoot internode differentiation zone that is part of a branch internode.

synonyms.text: zona de diferenciaci&#243n de la ramificaci&#243n del internodo (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: first order inflorescence axis
annotations.definition: An inflorescence axis (PO:0020122) that is the primary or main axis of an inflorescence (PO:0009049).
annotations.comment: Monopodial inflorescences, such as a raceme inflorescence (PO:0030115), have a centrally-located main axis; this axis is a first order inflorescence axis. In contrast, sympodial inflorescences, such as the riphidium inflorescence (PO:0030131), do not have a centrally-located main axis. The basal-most portion of a first order inflorescence axis is referred to as a peduncle (PO:0009053).

synonyms.text: primer orden del eje de la inflorescencia (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: fourth order inflorescence axis
annotations.definition: A higher order inflorescence axis (PO:0009081) that develops from an inflorescence axillary meristem (PO:0009105) of a third order inflorescence axis (PO:0025105).

synonyms.text: eje de cuarto orden de la inflorescencia (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: fifth order inflorescence axis
annotations.definition: A higher order inflorescence axis (PO:0009081) that develops from an inflorescence axillary meristem (PO:0009105) of a fourth order inflorescence axis (PO:0025106).

synonyms.text: eje de quinto orden de la inflorescencia (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: sixth order inflorescence axis
annotations.definition: A higher order inflorescence axis (PO:0009081) that develops from an inflorescence axillary meristem (PO:0009105) of a fifth order inflorescence axis (PO:0025107).

synonyms.text: eje de sexto orden de la inflorescencia (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: seventh order inflorescence axis
annotations.definition: A higher order inflorescence axis (PO:0009081) that develops from an inflorescence axillary meristem (PO:0009105) of a sixth order inflorescence axis (PO:0025108).

synonyms.text: eje de séptimo orden de la inflorescencia (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: eighth order inflorescence axis
annotations.definition: A higher order inflorescence axis (PO:0009081) that develops from an inflorescence axillary meristem (PO:0009105) of a seventh order inflorescence axis (PO:0025109).

synonyms.text: eje de octavo orden de la inflorescencia (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: ninth order inflorescence axis
annotations.definition: A higher order inflorescence axis (PO:0009081) that develops from an inflorescence axillary meristem (PO:0009105) of a eighth order inflorescence axis (PO:0025110).

synonyms.text: eje de noveno orden de la inflorescencia (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: tenth order inflorescence axis
annotations.definition: A higher order inflorescence axis (PO:0009081) that develops from an inflorescence axillary meristem (PO:0009105) of a ninth order inflorescence axis (PO:0025110).
annotations.comment: Tenth order inflorescence axis (PO:0025111) is the greatest specific inflorescence axis order in the PO; when mapping annotations to inflorescence axes which are of an order greater than ten, or when order is ambiguous or unknown, annotate directly to higher order inflorescence axis (PO:0009081).

synonyms.text: eje de décimo orden de la inflorescencia (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: second order infructescence axis
annotations.definition: A higher order infructescence axis (PO:0025243) which arises from a first order infructescence axis (PO:0025244) and develops from a second order inflorescence axis (PO:0006321).

synonyms.text: eje de segundo de la infructescencia (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: third order infructescence axis
annotations.definition: A higher order infructescence axis (PO:0025243) which arises from a second order infructescence axis (PO:0025112) and develops from a third order inflorescence axis (PO:0006322).

synonyms.text: eje de tres orden de la infructescencia (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: fourth order infructescence axis
annotations.definition: A higher order infructescence axis (PO:0025243) which arises from a third order infructescence axis (PO:0025113) and develops from a fourth order inflorescence axis (PO:0025105).

synonyms.text: eje de cuarto orden de la infructescencia (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: fifth order infructescence axis
annotations.definition: A higher order infructescence axis (PO:0025243) which arises from a fourth order infructescence axis (PO:0025114) and develops from a fifth order inflorescence axis (PO:0025106).

synonyms.text: eje de quinto orden de la infructescencia (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: sixth order infructescence axis
annotations.definition: A higher order infructescence axis (PO:0025243) which arises from a fifth order infructescence axis (PO:0025115) and develops from a sixth order inflorescence axis (PO:0025107).

synonyms.text: eje de sexto orden de la infructescencia (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: plant anatomical space
annotations.definition: An anatomical space that is part of a plant.
annotations.comment: CARO:0000005 'anatomical space' is defined as: An immaterial anatomical entity of three dimensions, that is generated by morphogenetic or other physiologic processes, and is bounded by an anatomical surface.

synonyms.text: 植物 解剖学（形態）的空間 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: anther pore
annotations.definition: A plant anatomical space that is a pore at the apex of an anther.
annotations.comment: Pollen may be released through the anther pore.

annotations.label: plant axis differentiation zone
annotations.definition: A cardinal organ part that is part of a plant axis and is located behind the elongation zone and contains cells that are differentiating into their final form and function.
annotations.comment: Primary, not secondary, tissue differentiation occurs in a differentiation zone.

synonyms.text: zona de diferenciaci&#243n de eje vegetal (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: antheridium sperm cell
annotations.definition: A plant sperm cell (PO:0000084) which develops from a spermatogenous cell (PO:0025525) and is located in an antheridium (PO:0025125).
annotations.comment: Antheridial sperm cells are motile and lack a cell wall.

annotations.label: pollen sperm cell
annotations.definition: A plant sperm cell (PO:0000084) that is part of the pollen (PO:0025281).
annotations.comment: Pollen sperm cells are structurally simple, usually non-motile cells that may contain a normal complement of cellular organelles, including heritable cytoplasmic organelles such as mitochondria and, in some plants, plastids, but lack a cell wall. In seed plants, pollen sperm cells are usually two in number. In angiosperms, during double fertilization, one fuses with the plant egg cell (PO:0020094) to produce a plant zygote (PO:0000423) while another fuses with the two polar nuclei of the embryo sac central cell (PO:0020090) to give rise to endosperm (PO:0009089).  In angiosperms, the pollen sperm cell arises from the generative cell (PO:0020097). In gymnosperms, the pollen sperm cell arises from the body cell (PO:0025525).

annotations.label: archegonium egg cell
annotations.definition: A plant egg cell (PO:0020094) that develops from the archegonium central cell (PO:0025509) and is located in the venter (PO:0030038).
annotations.comment: The archegonium egg cell has a common origin with the ventral canal cell.

annotations.label: embryo sac egg cell
annotations.definition: A plant egg cell (PO:0020094) that is part of an egg apparatus (PO:0020096).
annotations.comment: The egg apparatus is part of an embryo sac (PO:0025074).

annotations.label: multicellular plant gametangium
annotations.definition: A plant organ (PO:0009008) that produces one or more gametes (PO:0025006) and participates in the gametophyte development stage (PO:0028003).
annotations.comment: The multicellular plant gametangium; an archegonium (PO:0025126) and/or an antheridium (PO:0025125), occurs in bryophytes, pteridophytes and gymnosperms, but never in angiosperms.

synonyms.text: 多細胞植物配偶子嚢  (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: antheridium
annotations.definition: A multicellular plant gametangium (PO:0025124) that produces antheridium sperm cells (PO:0025120) and has as parts an antheridium jacket layer (PO:0030053) and an antheridium stalk (PO:0030035).
annotations.comment: The antheridium (PO:0025125) occurs in bryophytes and pteridophytes, but never in gymnosperms or angiosperms, where male gametes are produced in the pollen (PO:0025281), a specialized (reduced) gametangium.

annotations.label: archegonium
annotations.definition: A multicellular plant gametangium (PO:0025124) that develops from an archegonium initial cell (PO:0025510) and has as parts a venter (PO:0030038) and an archegonium neck (PO:0030039).
annotations.comment: At maturity, the archegonium produces an archegonium egg cell (PO:0025122).  In mosses, the archegonium also has part an archegonium stalk (PO:0030036). The archegonium (PO:0025126) occurs in bryophytes and pteridophytes, but never in angiosperms, where the female gamete (plant egg cell; PO:0020094) is produced by the embryo sac (PO:0025074), a specialized (reduced) gametangium.

annotations.label: primordium
annotations.definition: A portion of meristem tissue (PO:0009013) that has as parts protoderm (PO:0006210) and sub-epidermal meristematic tissue and is committed to the development of a particular plant structure (PO:0009011).
annotations.comment: A primordium appears as a protrusion and is the first distinct form of a plant organ (PO:0009008), cardinal organ part (PO:0025001), or collective plant organ structure (PO:0025007). The transition from a primordium to the plant structure it develops into is marked by the development of non-meristematic cells, although meristematic cells may be present after the transition.

annotations.label: phyllome primordium
annotations.definition: A primordium (PO:0025127) that develops from a phyllome anlagen (PO:0025430) and is part of a shoot apex (PO:0000037) and is committed to the development of a phyllome (PO:0006001).
annotations.comment: The transition from phyllome primordium to phyllome occurs when the first non-meristematic tissue develops begins to develop.

synonyms.text: フィロム原基（可視的）  (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: petiole lamina
annotations.definition: A lamina (PO:0025060) that is part of a petiole (PO:0020038).
annotations.comment: The entire petiole may be laminar, or the petiole may be more or less rounded in cross section with laminar extensions.

annotations.label: cigar leaf
annotations.definition: A leaf near the apex of a stem that is still rolled into a cylinder.
annotations.comment: Describes the phenotype of a vascular leaf during a leaf development phase in Musa and other monocots.

annotations.label: plant anatomical entity
annotations.definition: An anatomical entity that is or was part of a plant.
annotations.comment: Includes both material entities such as plant structures and immaterial entities such as plant anatomical spaces. CARO:0000000 'anatomical entity' is defined as: A part of a cellular organism that is either an immaterial entity or a material entity with granularity aboove the level of a protein complex.  Or, a substance produced by a cellular organism with granularity above the level of a protein complex.  Refers to BFO:0000004 'independent continuant'.

synonyms.text: 植物 解剖学（形態）的実体 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: canal
annotations.definition: A plant anatomical space (PO:0025117) that is either a groove on the surface, or a tube in the interior of a plant structure (PO:0009011).
annotations.comment: May be cylindrical (PATO:0001203) in shape, with a circular, D-shaped or other irregularly-shaped cross-section.

annotations.label: petiole canal
annotations.definition: A canal that is part of a petiole.
annotations.comment: May occur on the surface or be internal.

annotations.label: inflorescence branch crown
annotations.definition: A shoot system that forms the basal part of an inflorescence to which the pedicels are attached and in which the internodes do not elongate, giving the appearance of a ridge of raised tissue.

synonyms.text: corona de la ramificaci&#243n de la inflorescencia (Spanish, exact)

annotations.label: cigar leaf lamina abaxial epidermis
annotations.definition: A portion of leaf lamina abaxial epidermis PO:0000049) that covers the abaxial surface of a cigar leaf (PO:0025130).

synonyms.text: epidermis abaxial de la l&#225mina de la hoja en cigarro (Spanish, exact)
葉巻状葉の葉身背軸側表皮 (Japanese, exact)

annotations.label: free tepal
annotations.definition: A tepal (PO:0009033) that is part of a collective tepal structure (PO:0025021), along with a fused collective tepal structure (PO:0025138), but is separate from (PATO:0001505) the other tepals.
annotations.comment: A free tepal (PO:0025136) only occurs in a perianth (PO:0009058) that contains a fused collective tepal structure (PO:0025138).
